Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/podtopologyspread/scoring.go",
  "newString": "// ScoreNormalizer of the Score plugin.\nfunc (pl *PodTopologySpread) ScoreNormalizer() framework.ScoreNormalizer {\n\treturn pl\n}",
  "oldString": "// ScoreExtensions of the Score plugin.\nfunc (pl *PodTopologySpread) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn pl\n}",
  "originalFile": "/*\nCopyright 2019 The Kubernetes Authors.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\n\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\npackage podtopologyspread\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"sync/atomic\"\n\n\tv1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\"\n\t\"k8s.io/component-helpers/scheduling/corev1/nodeaffinity\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\"\n)\n\nconst preScoreStateKey = \"PreScore\" + Name\nconst invalidScore = -1\n\n// preScoreState computed at PreScore and used at Score.\n// Fields are exported for comparison during testing.\ntype preScoreState struct {\n\tConstraints []topologySpreadConstraint\n\t// IgnoredNodes is a set of node names which miss some Constraints[*].topologyKey.\n\tIgnoredNodes sets.Set[string]\n\t// TopologyPairToPodCounts is keyed with topologyPair, and valued with the number of matching pods.\n\tTopologyPairToPodCounts map[topologyPair]*int64\n\t// TopologyNormalizingWeight is the weight we give to the counts per topology.\n\t// This allows the pod counts of smaller topologies to not be watered down by\n\t// bigger ones.\n\tTopologyNormalizingWeight []float64\n}\n\n// Clone implements the mandatory Clone interface. We don't really copy the data since\n// there is no need for that.\nfunc (s *preScoreState) Clone() framework.StateData {\n\treturn s\n}\n\n// initPreScoreState iterates \"filteredNodes\" to filter out the nodes which\n// don't have required topologyKey(s), and initialize:\n// 1) s.TopologyPairToPodCounts: keyed with both eligible topology pair and node names.\n// 2) s.IgnoredNodes: the set of nodes that shouldn't be scored.\n// 3) s.TopologyNormalizingWeight: The weight to be given to each constraint based on the number of values in a topology.\nfunc (pl *PodTopologySpread) initPreScoreState(s *preScoreState, pod *v1.Pod, filteredNodes []*framework.NodeInfo, requireAllTopologies bool) error {\n\tvar err error\n\tif len(pod.Spec.TopologySpreadConstraints) > 0 {\n\t\ts.Constraints, err = pl.filterTopologySpreadConstraints(\n\t\t\tpod.Spec.TopologySpreadConstraints,\n\t\t\tpod.Labels,\n\t\t\tv1.ScheduleAnyway,\n\t\t)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"obtaining pod's soft topology spread constraints: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t} else {\n\t\ts.Constraints, err = pl.buildDefaultConstraints(pod, v1.ScheduleAnyway)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"setting default soft topology spread constraints: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif len(s.Constraints) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\ttopoSize := make([]int, len(s.Constraints))\n\tfor _, node := range filteredNodes {\n\t\tif requireAllTopologies && !nodeLabelsMatchSpreadConstraints(node.Node().Labels, s.Constraints) {\n\t\t\t// Nodes which don't have all required topologyKeys present are ignored\n\t\t\t// when scoring later.\n\t\t\ts.IgnoredNodes.Insert(node.Node().Name)\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor i, constraint := range s.Constraints {\n\t\t\t// per-node counts are calculated during Score.\n\t\t\tif constraint.TopologyKey == v1.LabelHostname {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tpair := topologyPair{key: constraint.TopologyKey, value: node.Node().Labels[constraint.TopologyKey]}\n\t\t\tif s.TopologyPairToPodCounts[pair] == nil {\n\t\t\t\ts.TopologyPairToPodCounts[pair] = new(int64)\n\t\t\t\ttopoSize[i]++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\ts.TopologyNormalizingWeight = make([]float64, len(s.Constraints))\n\tfor i, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\tsz := topoSize[i]\n\t\tif c.TopologyKey == v1.LabelHostname {\n\t\t\tsz = len(filteredNodes) - len(s.IgnoredNodes)\n\t\t}\n\t\ts.TopologyNormalizingWeight[i] = topologyNormalizingWeight(sz)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// PreScore builds and writes cycle state used by Score and NormalizeScore.\nfunc (pl *PodTopologySpread) PreScore(\n\tctx context.Context,\n\tcycleState *framework.CycleState,\n\tpod *v1.Pod,\n\tfilteredNodes []*framework.NodeInfo,\n) *framework.Status {\n\tallNodes, err := pl.sharedLister.NodeInfos().List()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(\"getting all nodes: %w\", err))\n\t}\n\n\tif len(allNodes) == 0 {\n\t\t// No need to score.\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip)\n\t}\n\n\tstate := &preScoreState{\n\t\tIgnoredNodes:            sets.New[string](),\n\t\tTopologyPairToPodCounts: make(map[topologyPair]*int64),\n\t}\n\t// Only require that nodes have all the topology labels if using\n\t// non-system-default spreading rules. This allows nodes that don't have a\n\t// zone label to still have hostname spreading.\n\trequireAllTopologies := len(pod.Spec.TopologySpreadConstraints) > 0 || !pl.systemDefaulted\n\terr = pl.initPreScoreState(state, pod, filteredNodes, requireAllTopologies)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(\"calculating preScoreState: %w\", err))\n\t}\n\n\t// return Skip if incoming pod doesn't have soft topology spread Constraints.\n\tif len(state.Constraints) == 0 {\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip)\n\t}\n\n\t// Ignore parsing errors for backwards compatibility.\n\trequiredNodeAffinity := nodeaffinity.GetRequiredNodeAffinity(pod)\n\tprocessAllNode := func(i int) {\n\t\tnodeInfo := allNodes[i]\n\t\tnode := nodeInfo.Node()\n\n\t\tif !pl.enableNodeInclusionPolicyInPodTopologySpread {\n\t\t\t// `node` should satisfy incoming pod's NodeSelector/NodeAffinity\n\t\t\tif match, _ := requiredNodeAffinity.Match(node); !match {\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// All topologyKeys need to be present in `node`\n\t\tif requireAllTopologies && !nodeLabelsMatchSpreadConstraints(node.Labels, state.Constraints) {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, c := range state.Constraints {\n\t\t\tif pl.enableNodeInclusionPolicyInPodTopologySpread &&\n\t\t\t\t!c.matchNodeInclusionPolicies(pod, node, requiredNodeAffinity) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tpair := topologyPair{key: c.TopologyKey, value: node.Labels[c.TopologyKey]}\n\t\t\t// If current topology pair is not associated with any candidate node,\n\t\t\t// continue to avoid unnecessary calculation.\n\t\t\t// Per-node counts are also skipped, as they are done during Score.\n\t\t\ttpCount := state.TopologyPairToPodCounts[pair]\n\t\t\tif tpCount == nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcount := countPodsMatchSelector(nodeInfo.Pods, c.Selector, pod.Namespace)\n\t\t\tatomic.AddInt64(tpCount, int64(count))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tpl.parallelizer.Until(ctx, len(allNodes), processAllNode, pl.Name())\n\n\tcycleState.Write(preScoreStateKey, state)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// Score invoked at the Score extension point.\n// The \"score\" returned in this function is the matching number of pods on the `nodeName`,\n// it is normalized later.\nfunc (pl *PodTopologySpread) Score(ctx context.Context, cycleState *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *framework.Status) {\n\tnodeInfo, err := pl.sharedLister.NodeInfos().Get(nodeName)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(\"getting node %q from Snapshot: %w\", nodeName, err))\n\t}\n\n\tnode := nodeInfo.Node()\n\ts, err := getPreScoreState(cycleState)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, framework.AsStatus(err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Return if the node is not qualified.\n\tif s.IgnoredNodes.Has(node.Name) {\n\t\treturn 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// For each present <pair>, current node gets a credit of <matchSum>.\n\t// And we sum up <matchSum> and return it as this node's score.\n\tvar score float64\n\tfor i, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\tif tpVal, ok := node.Labels[c.TopologyKey]; ok {\n\t\t\tvar cnt int64\n\t\t\tif c.TopologyKey == v1.LabelHostname {\n\t\t\t\tcnt = int64(countPodsMatchSelector(nodeInfo.Pods, c.Selector, pod.Namespace))\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tpair := topologyPair{key: c.TopologyKey, value: tpVal}\n\t\t\t\tcnt = *s.TopologyPairToPodCounts[pair]\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tscore += scoreForCount(cnt, c.MaxSkew, s.TopologyNormalizingWeight[i])\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn int64(math.Round(score)), nil\n}\n\n// NormalizeScore invoked after scoring all nodes.\nfunc (pl *PodTopologySpread) NormalizeScore(ctx context.Context, cycleState *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, scores framework.NodeScoreList) *framework.Status {\n\ts, err := getPreScoreState(cycleState)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn framework.AsStatus(err)\n\t}\n\tif s == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Calculate <minScore> and <maxScore>\n\tvar minScore int64 = math.MaxInt64\n\tvar maxScore int64\n\tfor i, score := range scores {\n\t\t// it's mandatory to check if <score.Name> is present in m.IgnoredNodes\n\t\tif s.IgnoredNodes.Has(score.Name) {\n\t\t\tscores[i].Score = invalidScore\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif score.Score < minScore {\n\t\t\tminScore = score.Score\n\t\t}\n\t\tif score.Score > maxScore {\n\t\t\tmaxScore = score.Score\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := range scores {\n\t\tif scores[i].Score == invalidScore {\n\t\t\tscores[i].Score = 0\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif maxScore == 0 {\n\t\t\tscores[i].Score = framework.MaxNodeScore\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\ts := scores[i].Score\n\t\tscores[i].Score = framework.MaxNodeScore * (maxScore + minScore - s) / maxScore\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// ScoreExtensions of the Score plugin.\nfunc (pl *PodTopologySpread) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn pl\n}\n\nfunc getPreScoreState(cycleState *framework.CycleState) (*preScoreState, error) {\n\tc, err := cycleState.Read(preScoreStateKey)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"error reading %q from cycleState: %w\", preScoreStateKey, err)\n\t}\n\n\ts, ok := c.(*preScoreState)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%+v  convert to podtopologyspread.preScoreState error\", c)\n\t}\n\treturn s, nil\n}\n\n// topologyNormalizingWeight calculates the weight for the topology, based on\n// the number of values that exist for a topology.\n// Since <size> is at least 1 (all nodes that passed the Filters are in the\n// same topology), and k8s supports 5k nodes, the result is in the interval\n// <1.09, 8.52>.\n//\n// Note: <size> could also be zero when no nodes have the required topologies,\n// however we don't care about topology weight in this case as we return a 0\n// score for all nodes.\nfunc topologyNormalizingWeight(size int) float64 {\n\treturn math.Log(float64(size + 2))\n}\n\n// scoreForCount calculates the score based on number of matching pods in a\n// topology domain, the constraint's maxSkew and the topology weight.\n// `maxSkew-1` is added to the score so that differences between topology\n// domains get watered down, controlling the tolerance of the score to skews.\nfunc scoreForCount(cnt int64, maxSkew int32, tpWeight float64) float64 {\n\treturn float64(cnt)*tpWeight + float64(maxSkew-1)\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   return nil",
        " }",

        "-// ScoreExtensions of the Score plugin.",
        "-func (pl *PodTopologySpread) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {",
        "+// ScoreNormalizer of the Score plugin.",
        "+func (pl *PodTopologySpread) ScoreNormalizer() framework.ScoreNormalizer {",
        "   return pl",
        " }",
        " "
      ],
      "newLines": 8,
      "newStart": 265,
      "oldLines": 8,
      "oldStart": 265
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

  "newString": "// ScoreNormalizer of the Score plugin.\nfunc (pl *InterPodAffinity) ScoreNormalizer() framework.ScoreNormalizer {\n\treturn pl\n}",
  "oldString": "// ScoreExtensions of the Score plugin.\nfunc (pl *InterPodAffinity) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn pl\n}",
  "originalFile": "/*\nCopyright 2019 The Kubernetes Authors.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\n\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\npackage interpodaffinity\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"sync/atomic\"\n\n\tv1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/labels\"\n\t\"k8s.io/klog/v2\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\"\n)\n\n// preScoreStateKey is the key in CycleState to InterPodAffinity pre-computed data for Scoring.\nconst preScoreStateKey = \"PreScore\" + Name\n\ntype scoreMap map[string]map[string]int64\n\n// preScoreState computed at PreScore and used at Score.\ntype preScoreState struct {\n\ttopologyScore scoreMap\n\tpodInfo       *framework.PodInfo\n\t// A copy of the incoming pod's namespace labels.\n\tnamespaceLabels labels.Set\n}\n\n// Clone implements the mandatory Clone interface. We don't really copy the data since\n// there is no need for that.\nfunc (s *preScoreState) Clone() framework.StateData {\n\treturn s\n}\n\nfunc (m scoreMap) processTerm(term *framework.AffinityTerm, weight int32, pod *v1.Pod, nsLabels labels.Set, node *v1.Node, multiplier int32) {\n\tif term.Matches(pod, nsLabels) {\n\t\tif tpValue, tpValueExist := node.Labels[term.TopologyKey]; tpValueExist {\n\t\t\tif m[term.TopologyKey] == nil {\n\t\t\t\tm[term.TopologyKey] = make(map[string]int64)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tm[term.TopologyKey][tpValue] += int64(weight * multiplier)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (m scoreMap) processTerms(terms []framework.WeightedAffinityTerm, pod *v1.Pod, nsLabels labels.Set, node *v1.Node, multiplier int32) {\n\tfor _, term := range terms {\n\t\tm.processTerm(&term.AffinityTerm, term.Weight, pod, nsLabels, node, multiplier)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (m scoreMap) append(other scoreMap) {\n\tfor topology, oScores := range other {\n\t\tscores := m[topology]\n\t\tif scores == nil {\n\t\t\tm[topology] = oScores\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor k, v := range oScores {\n\t\t\tscores[k] += v\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (pl *InterPodAffinity) processExistingPod(\n\tstate *preScoreState,\n\texistingPod *framework.PodInfo,\n\texistingPodNodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo,\n\tincomingPod *v1.Pod,\n\ttopoScore scoreMap,\n) {\n\texistingPodNode := existingPodNodeInfo.Node()\n\tif len(existingPodNode.Labels) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// For every soft pod affinity term of <pod>, if <existingPod> matches the term,\n\t// increment <p.counts> for every node in the cluster with the same <term.TopologyKey>\n\t// value as that of <existingPods>`s node by the term`s weight.\n\t// Note that the incoming pod's terms have the namespaceSelector merged into the namespaces, and so\n\t// here we don't lookup the existing pod's namespace labels, hence passing nil for nsLabels.\n\ttopoScore.processTerms(state.podInfo.PreferredAffinityTerms, existingPod.Pod, nil, existingPodNode, 1)\n\n\t// For every soft pod anti-affinity term of <pod>, if <existingPod> matches the term,\n\t// decrement <p.counts> for every node in the cluster with the same <term.TopologyKey>\n\t// value as that of <existingPod>`s node by the term`s weight.\n\t// Note that the incoming pod's terms have the namespaceSelector merged into the namespaces, and so\n\t// here we don't lookup the existing pod's namespace labels, hence passing nil for nsLabels.\n\ttopoScore.processTerms(state.podInfo.PreferredAntiAffinityTerms, existingPod.Pod, nil, existingPodNode, -1)\n\n\t// For every hard pod affinity term of <existingPod>, if <pod> matches the term,\n\t// increment <p.counts> for every node in the cluster with the same <term.TopologyKey>\n\t// value as that of <existingPod>'s node by the constant <args.hardPodAffinityWeight>\n\tif pl.args.HardPodAffinityWeight > 0 && len(existingPodNode.Labels) != 0 {\n\t\tfor _, t := range existingPod.RequiredAffinityTerms {\n\t\t\ttopoScore.processTerm(&t, pl.args.HardPodAffinityWeight, incomingPod, state.namespaceLabels, existingPodNode, 1)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// For every soft pod affinity term of <existingPod>, if <pod> matches the term,\n\t// increment <p.counts> for every node in the cluster with the same <term.TopologyKey>\n\t// value as that of <existingPod>'s node by the term's weight.\n\ttopoScore.processTerms(existingPod.PreferredAffinityTerms, incomingPod, state.namespaceLabels, existingPodNode, 1)\n\n\t// For every soft pod anti-affinity term of <existingPod>, if <pod> matches the term,\n\t// decrement <pm.counts> for every node in the cluster with the same <term.TopologyKey>\n\t// value as that of <existingPod>'s node by the term's weight.\n\ttopoScore.processTerms(existingPod.PreferredAntiAffinityTerms, incomingPod, state.namespaceLabels, existingPodNode, -1)\n}\n\n// PreScore builds and writes cycle state used by Score and NormalizeScore.\nfunc (pl *InterPodAffinity) PreScore(\n\tpCtx context.Context,\n\tcycleState *framework.CycleState,\n\tpod *v1.Pod,\n\tnodes []*framework.NodeInfo,\n) *framework.Status {\n\tif len(nodes) == 0 {\n\t\t// No nodes to score.\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip)\n\t}\n\n\tif pl.sharedLister == nil {\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Error, \"empty shared lister in InterPodAffinity PreScore\")\n\t}\n\n\taffinity := pod.Spec.Affinity\n\thasPreferredAffinityConstraints := affinity != nil && affinity.PodAffinity != nil && len(affinity.PodAffinity.PreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution) > 0\n\thasPreferredAntiAffinityConstraints := affinity != nil && affinity.PodAntiAffinity != nil && len(affinity.PodAntiAffinity.PreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution) > 0\n\thasConstraints := hasPreferredAffinityConstraints || hasPreferredAntiAffinityConstraints\n\n\t// Optionally ignore calculating preferences of existing pods' affinity rules\n\t// if the incoming pod has no inter-pod affinities.\n\tif pl.args.IgnorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods && !hasConstraints {\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip)\n\t}\n\n\t// Unless the pod being scheduled has preferred affinity terms, we only\n\t// need to process nodes hosting pods with affinity.\n\tvar allNodes []*framework.NodeInfo\n\tvar err error\n\tif hasConstraints {\n\t\tallNodes, err = pl.sharedLister.NodeInfos().List()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get all nodes from shared lister: %w\", err))\n\t\t}\n\t} else {\n\t\tallNodes, err = pl.sharedLister.NodeInfos().HavePodsWithAffinityList()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get pods with affinity list: %w\", err))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tstate := &preScoreState{\n\t\ttopologyScore: make(map[string]map[string]int64),\n\t}\n\n\tif state.podInfo, err = framework.NewPodInfo(pod); err != nil {\n\t\t// Ideally we never reach here, because errors will be caught by PreFilter\n\t\treturn framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse pod: %w\", err))\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := range state.podInfo.PreferredAffinityTerms {\n\t\tif err := pl.mergeAffinityTermNamespacesIfNotEmpty(&state.podInfo.PreferredAffinityTerms[i].AffinityTerm); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(\"updating PreferredAffinityTerms: %w\", err))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tfor i := range state.podInfo.PreferredAntiAffinityTerms {\n\t\tif err := pl.mergeAffinityTermNamespacesIfNotEmpty(&state.podInfo.PreferredAntiAffinityTerms[i].AffinityTerm); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(\"updating PreferredAntiAffinityTerms: %w\", err))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tlogger := klog.FromContext(pCtx)\n\tstate.namespaceLabels = GetNamespaceLabelsSnapshot(logger, pod.Namespace, pl.nsLister)\n\n\ttopoScores := make([]scoreMap, len(allNodes))\n\tindex := int32(-1)\n\tprocessNode := func(i int) {\n\t\tnodeInfo := allNodes[i]\n\n\t\t// Unless the pod being scheduled has preferred affinity terms, we only\n\t\t// need to process pods with affinity in the node.\n\t\tpodsToProcess := nodeInfo.PodsWithAffinity\n\t\tif hasConstraints {\n\t\t\t// We need to process all the pods.\n\t\t\tpodsToProcess = nodeInfo.Pods\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttopoScore := make(scoreMap)\n\t\tfor _, existingPod := range podsToProcess {\n\t\t\tpl.processExistingPod(state, existingPod, nodeInfo, pod, topoScore)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif len(topoScore) > 0 {\n\t\t\ttopoScores[atomic.AddInt32(&index, 1)] = topoScore\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tpl.parallelizer.Until(pCtx, len(allNodes), processNode, pl.Name())\n\n\tif index == -1 {\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i <= int(index); i++ {\n\t\tstate.topologyScore.append(topoScores[i])\n\t}\n\n\tcycleState.Write(preScoreStateKey, state)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc getPreScoreState(cycleState *framework.CycleState) (*preScoreState, error) {\n\tc, err := cycleState.Read(preScoreStateKey)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to read %q from cycleState: %w\", preScoreStateKey, err)\n\t}\n\n\ts, ok := c.(*preScoreState)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%+v  convert to interpodaffinity.preScoreState error\", c)\n\t}\n\treturn s, nil\n}\n\n// Score invoked at the Score extension point.\n// The \"score\" returned in this function is the sum of weights got from cycleState which have its topologyKey matching with the node's labels.\n// it is normalized later.\n// Note: the returned \"score\" is positive for pod-affinity, and negative for pod-antiaffinity.\nfunc (pl *InterPodAffinity) Score(ctx context.Context, cycleState *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *framework.Status) {\n\tnodeInfo, err := pl.sharedLister.NodeInfos().Get(nodeName)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, framework.AsStatus(fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get node %q from Snapshot: %w\", nodeName, err))\n\t}\n\tnode := nodeInfo.Node()\n\n\ts, err := getPreScoreState(cycleState)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, framework.AsStatus(err)\n\t}\n\tvar score int64\n\tfor tpKey, tpValues := range s.topologyScore {\n\t\tif v, exist := node.Labels[tpKey]; exist {\n\t\t\tscore += tpValues[v]\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn score, nil\n}\n\n// NormalizeScore normalizes the score for each filteredNode.\nfunc (pl *InterPodAffinity) NormalizeScore(ctx context.Context, cycleState *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, scores framework.NodeScoreList) *framework.Status {\n\ts, err := getPreScoreState(cycleState)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn framework.AsStatus(err)\n\t}\n\tif len(s.topologyScore) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar minCount int64 = math.MaxInt64\n\tvar maxCount int64 = math.MinInt64\n\tfor i := range scores {\n\t\tscore := scores[i].Score\n\t\tif score > maxCount {\n\t\t\tmaxCount = score\n\t\t}\n\t\tif score < minCount {\n\t\t\tminCount = score\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tmaxMinDiff := maxCount - minCount\n\tfor i := range scores {\n\t\tfScore := float64(0)\n\t\tif maxMinDiff > 0 {\n\t\t\tfScore = float64(framework.MaxNodeScore) * (float64(scores[i].Score-minCount) / float64(maxMinDiff))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tscores[i].Score = int64(fScore)\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// ScoreExtensions of the Score plugin.\nfunc (pl *InterPodAffinity) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn pl\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [

        " }",

  "originalFile": "/*\nCopyright 2020 The Kubernetes Authors.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\n\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\npackage framework\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sync/atomic\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tv1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\"\n\tframeworkruntime \"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime\"\n)\n\n// ErrReasonFake is a fake error message denotes the filter function errored.\nconst ErrReasonFake = \"Nodes failed the fake plugin\"\n\n// FalseFilterPlugin is a filter plugin which always return Unschedulable when Filter function is called.\ntype FalseFilterPlugin struct{}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *FalseFilterPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn \"FalseFilter\"\n}\n\n// Filter invoked at the filter extension point.\nfunc (pl *FalseFilterPlugin) Filter(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Unschedulable, ErrReasonFake)\n}\n\n// NewFalseFilterPlugin initializes a FalseFilterPlugin and returns it.\nfunc NewFalseFilterPlugin(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn &FalseFilterPlugin{}, nil\n}\n\n// TrueFilterPlugin is a filter plugin which always return Success when Filter function is called.\ntype TrueFilterPlugin struct{}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *TrueFilterPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn \"TrueFilter\"\n}\n\n// Filter invoked at the filter extension point.\nfunc (pl *TrueFilterPlugin) Filter(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// NewTrueFilterPlugin initializes a TrueFilterPlugin and returns it.\nfunc NewTrueFilterPlugin(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn &TrueFilterPlugin{}, nil\n}\n\ntype FakePreFilterAndFilterPlugin struct {\n\t*FakePreFilterPlugin\n\t*FakeFilterPlugin\n}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl FakePreFilterAndFilterPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn \"FakePreFilterAndFilterPlugin\"\n}\n\n// FakeFilterPlugin is a test filter plugin to record how many times its Filter() function have\n// been called, and it returns different 'Code' depending on its internal 'failedNodeReturnCodeMap'.\ntype FakeFilterPlugin struct {\n\tNumFilterCalled         int32\n\tFailedNodeReturnCodeMap map[string]framework.Code\n}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *FakeFilterPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn \"FakeFilter\"\n}\n\n// Filter invoked at the filter extension point.\nfunc (pl *FakeFilterPlugin) Filter(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\tatomic.AddInt32(&pl.NumFilterCalled, 1)\n\n\tif returnCode, ok := pl.FailedNodeReturnCodeMap[nodeInfo.Node().Name]; ok {\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(returnCode, fmt.Sprintf(\"injecting failure for pod %v\", pod.Name))\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// NewFakeFilterPlugin initializes a fakeFilterPlugin and returns it.\nfunc NewFakeFilterPlugin(failedNodeReturnCodeMap map[string]framework.Code) frameworkruntime.PluginFactory {\n\treturn func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\treturn &FakeFilterPlugin{\n\t\t\tFailedNodeReturnCodeMap: failedNodeReturnCodeMap,\n\t\t}, nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// MatchFilterPlugin is a filter plugin which return Success when the evaluated pod and node\n// have the same name; otherwise return Unschedulable.\ntype MatchFilterPlugin struct{}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *MatchFilterPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn \"MatchFilter\"\n}\n\n// Filter invoked at the filter extension point.\nfunc (pl *MatchFilterPlugin) Filter(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\tnode := nodeInfo.Node()\n\tif node == nil {\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Error, \"node not found\")\n\t}\n\tif pod.Name == node.Name {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Unschedulable, ErrReasonFake)\n}\n\n// NewMatchFilterPlugin initializes a MatchFilterPlugin and returns it.\nfunc NewMatchFilterPlugin(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn &MatchFilterPlugin{}, nil\n}\n\n// FakePreFilterPlugin is a test filter plugin.\ntype FakePreFilterPlugin struct {\n\tResult *framework.PreFilterResult\n\tStatus *framework.Status\n\tname   string\n}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *FakePreFilterPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn pl.name\n}\n\n// PreFilter invoked at the PreFilter extension point.\nfunc (pl *FakePreFilterPlugin) PreFilter(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod) (*framework.PreFilterResult, *framework.Status) {\n\treturn pl.Result, pl.Status\n}\n\n// PreFilterExtensions no extensions implemented by this plugin.\nfunc (pl *FakePreFilterPlugin) PreFilterExtensions() framework.PreFilterExtensions {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// NewFakePreFilterPlugin initializes a fakePreFilterPlugin and returns it.\nfunc NewFakePreFilterPlugin(name string, result *framework.PreFilterResult, status *framework.Status) frameworkruntime.PluginFactory {\n\treturn func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\treturn &FakePreFilterPlugin{\n\t\t\tResult: result,\n\t\t\tStatus: status,\n\t\t\tname:   name,\n\t\t}, nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// FakeReservePlugin is a test reserve plugin.\ntype FakeReservePlugin struct {\n\tStatus *framework.Status\n}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *FakeReservePlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn \"FakeReserve\"\n}\n\n// Reserve invoked at the Reserve extension point.\nfunc (pl *FakeReservePlugin) Reserve(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, _ *v1.Pod, _ string) *framework.Status {\n\treturn pl.Status\n}\n\n// Unreserve invoked at the Unreserve extension point.\nfunc (pl *FakeReservePlugin) Unreserve(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, _ *v1.Pod, _ string) {\n}\n\n// NewFakeReservePlugin initializes a fakeReservePlugin and returns it.\nfunc NewFakeReservePlugin(status *framework.Status) frameworkruntime.PluginFactory {\n\treturn func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\treturn &FakeReservePlugin{\n\t\t\tStatus: status,\n\t\t}, nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// FakePreBindPlugin is a test prebind plugin.\ntype FakePreBindPlugin struct {\n\tStatus *framework.Status\n}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *FakePreBindPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn \"FakePreBind\"\n}\n\n// PreBind invoked at the PreBind extension point.\nfunc (pl *FakePreBindPlugin) PreBind(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, _ *v1.Pod, _ string) *framework.Status {\n\treturn pl.Status\n}\n\n// NewFakePreBindPlugin initializes a fakePreBindPlugin and returns it.\nfunc NewFakePreBindPlugin(status *framework.Status) frameworkruntime.PluginFactory {\n\treturn func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\treturn &FakePreBindPlugin{\n\t\t\tStatus: status,\n\t\t}, nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// FakePermitPlugin is a test permit plugin.\ntype FakePermitPlugin struct {\n\tStatus  *framework.Status\n\tTimeout time.Duration\n}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *FakePermitPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn \"FakePermit\"\n}\n\n// Permit invoked at the Permit extension point.\nfunc (pl *FakePermitPlugin) Permit(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, _ *v1.Pod, _ string) (*framework.Status, time.Duration) {\n\treturn pl.Status, pl.Timeout\n}\n\n// NewFakePermitPlugin initializes a fakePermitPlugin and returns it.\nfunc NewFakePermitPlugin(status *framework.Status, timeout time.Duration) frameworkruntime.PluginFactory {\n\treturn func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\treturn &FakePermitPlugin{\n\t\t\tStatus:  status,\n\t\t\tTimeout: timeout,\n\t\t}, nil\n\t}\n}\n\ntype FakePreScoreAndScorePlugin struct {\n\tname           string\n\tscore          int64\n\tpreScoreStatus *framework.Status\n\tscoreStatus    *framework.Status\n}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *FakePreScoreAndScorePlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn pl.name\n}\n\nfunc (pl *FakePreScoreAndScorePlugin) Score(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *framework.Status) {\n\treturn pl.score, pl.scoreStatus\n}\n\nfunc (pl *FakePreScoreAndScorePlugin) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (pl *FakePreScoreAndScorePlugin) PreScore(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn pl.preScoreStatus\n}\n\nfunc NewFakePreScoreAndScorePlugin(name string, score int64, preScoreStatus, scoreStatus *framework.Status) frameworkruntime.PluginFactory {\n\treturn func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\treturn &FakePreScoreAndScorePlugin{\n\t\t\tname:           name,\n\t\t\tscore:          score,\n\t\t\tpreScoreStatus: preScoreStatus,\n\t\t\tscoreStatus:    scoreStatus,\n\t\t}, nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// NewEqualPrioritizerPlugin returns a factory function to build equalPrioritizerPlugin.\nfunc NewEqualPrioritizerPlugin() frameworkruntime.PluginFactory {\n\treturn func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\treturn &FakePreScoreAndScorePlugin{\n\t\t\tname:  \"EqualPrioritizerPlugin\",\n\t\t\tscore: 1,\n\t\t}, nil\n\t}\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "/*\nCopyright 2020 The Kubernetes Authors.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\npackage framework\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\n\tv1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\"\n\tcorev1helpers \"k8s.io/component-helpers/scheduling/corev1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/klog/v2\"\n\textenderv1 \"k8s.io/kube-scheduler/extender/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\"\n\tframeworkruntime \"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework/runtime\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/util\"\n)\n\n// FitPredicate is a function type which is used in fake extender.\ntype FitPredicate func(pod *v1.Pod, node *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status\n\n// PriorityFunc is a function type which is used in fake extender.\ntype PriorityFunc func(pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) (*framework.NodeScoreList, error)\n\n// PriorityConfig is used in fake extender to perform Prioritize function.\ntype PriorityConfig struct {\n\tFunction PriorityFunc\n\tWeight   int64\n}\n\n// ErrorPredicateExtender implements FitPredicate function to always return error status.\nfunc ErrorPredicateExtender(pod *v1.Pod, node *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Error, \"some error\")\n}\n\n// FalsePredicateExtender implements FitPredicate function to always return unschedulable status.\nfunc FalsePredicateExtender(pod *v1.Pod, node *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Unschedulable, fmt.Sprintf(\"pod is unschedulable on the node %q\", node.Node().Name))\n}\n\n// TruePredicateExtender implements FitPredicate function to always return success status.\nfunc TruePredicateExtender(pod *v1.Pod, node *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Success)\n}\n\n// Node1PredicateExtender implements FitPredicate function to return true\n// when the given node's name is \"node1\"; otherwise return false.\nfunc Node1PredicateExtender(pod *v1.Pod, node *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\tif node.Node().Name == \"node1\" {\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Success)\n\t}\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Unschedulable, fmt.Sprintf(\"node %q is not allowed\", node.Node().Name))\n}\n\n// Node2PredicateExtender implements FitPredicate function to return true\n// when the given node's name is \"node2\"; otherwise return false.\nfunc Node2PredicateExtender(pod *v1.Pod, node *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\tif node.Node().Name == \"node2\" {\n\t\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Success)\n\t}\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Unschedulable, fmt.Sprintf(\"node %q is not allowed\", node.Node().Name))\n}\n\n// ErrorPrioritizerExtender implements PriorityFunc function to always return error.\nfunc ErrorPrioritizerExtender(pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) (*framework.NodeScoreList, error) {\n\treturn &framework.NodeScoreList{}, fmt.Errorf(\"some error\")\n}\n\n// Node1PrioritizerExtender implements PriorityFunc function to give score 10\n// if the given node's name is \"node1\"; otherwise score 1.\nfunc Node1PrioritizerExtender(pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) (*framework.NodeScoreList, error) {\n\tresult := framework.NodeScoreList{}\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\tscore := 1\n\t\tif node.Node().Name == \"node1\" {\n\t\t\tscore = 10\n\t\t}\n\t\tresult = append(result, framework.NodeScore{Name: node.Node().Name, Score: int64(score)})\n\t}\n\treturn &result, nil\n}\n\n// Node2PrioritizerExtender implements PriorityFunc function to give score 10\n// if the given node's name is \"node2\"; otherwise score 1.\nfunc Node2PrioritizerExtender(pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) (*framework.NodeScoreList, error) {\n\tresult := framework.NodeScoreList{}\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\tscore := 1\n\t\tif node.Node().Name == \"node2\" {\n\t\t\tscore = 10\n\t\t}\n\t\tresult = append(result, framework.NodeScore{Name: node.Node().Name, Score: int64(score)})\n\t}\n\treturn &result, nil\n}\n\ntype node2PrioritizerPlugin struct{}\n\n// NewNode2PrioritizerPlugin returns a factory function to build node2PrioritizerPlugin.\nfunc NewNode2PrioritizerPlugin() frameworkruntime.PluginFactory {\n\treturn func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\treturn &node2PrioritizerPlugin{}, nil\n\t}\n}\n\n// Name returns name of the plugin.\nfunc (pl *node2PrioritizerPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn \"Node2Prioritizer\"\n}\n\n// Score return score 100 if the given nodeName is \"node2\"; otherwise return score 10.\nfunc (pl *node2PrioritizerPlugin) Score(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, _ *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *framework.Status) {\n\tscore := 10\n\tif nodeName == \"node2\" {\n\t\tscore = 100\n\t}\n\treturn int64(score), nil\n}\n\n// ScoreExtensions returns nil.\nfunc (pl *node2PrioritizerPlugin) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// FakeExtender is a data struct which implements the Extender interface.\ntype FakeExtender struct {\n\t// ExtenderName indicates this fake extender's name.\n\t// Note that extender name should be unique.\n\tExtenderName     string\n\tPredicates       []FitPredicate\n\tPrioritizers     []PriorityConfig\n\tWeight           int64\n\tNodeCacheCapable bool\n\tFilteredNodes    []*framework.NodeInfo\n\tUnInterested     bool\n\tIgnorable        bool\n\tBinder           func() error\n\n\t// Cached node information for fake extender\n\tCachedNodeNameToInfo map[string]*framework.NodeInfo\n}\n\nconst defaultFakeExtenderName = \"defaultFakeExtender\"\n\n// Name returns name of the extender.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) Name() string {\n\tif f.ExtenderName == \"\" {\n\t\t// If ExtenderName is unset, use default name.\n\t\treturn defaultFakeExtenderName\n\t}\n\treturn f.ExtenderName\n}\n\n// IsIgnorable returns a bool value indicating whether internal errors can be ignored.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) IsIgnorable() bool {\n\treturn f.Ignorable\n}\n\n// SupportsPreemption returns true indicating the extender supports preemption.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) SupportsPreemption() bool {\n\t// Assume preempt verb is always defined.\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// ProcessPreemption implements the extender preempt function.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) ProcessPreemption(\n\tpod *v1.Pod,\n\tnodeNameToVictims map[string]*extenderv1.Victims,\n\tnodeInfos framework.NodeInfoLister,\n) (map[string]*extenderv1.Victims, error) {\n\tnodeNameToVictimsCopy := map[string]*extenderv1.Victims{}\n\t// We don't want to change the original nodeNameToVictims\n\tfor k, v := range nodeNameToVictims {\n\t\t// In real world implementation, extender's user should have their own way to get node object\n\t\t// by name if needed (e.g. query kube-apiserver etc).\n\t\t//\n\t\t// For test purpose, we just use node from parameters directly.\n\t\tnodeNameToVictimsCopy[k] = v\n\t}\n\n\t// If Extender.ProcessPreemption ever gets extended with a context parameter, then the logger should be retrieved from that.\n\t// Now, in order not to modify the Extender interface, we get the logger from klog.TODO()\n\tlogger := klog.TODO()\n\tfor nodeName, victims := range nodeNameToVictimsCopy {\n\t\t// Try to do preemption on extender side.\n\t\tnodeInfo, _ := nodeInfos.Get(nodeName)\n\t\textenderVictimPods, extenderPDBViolations, fits, err := f.selectVictimsOnNodeByExtender(logger, pod, nodeInfo)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\t// If it's unfit after extender's preemption, this node is unresolvable by preemption overall,\n\t\t// let's remove it from potential preemption nodes.\n\t\tif !fits {\n\t\t\tdelete(nodeNameToVictimsCopy, nodeName)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Append new victims to original victims\n\t\t\tnodeNameToVictimsCopy[nodeName].Pods = append(victims.Pods, extenderVictimPods...)\n\t\t\tnodeNameToVictimsCopy[nodeName].NumPDBViolations = victims.NumPDBViolations + int64(extenderPDBViolations)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nodeNameToVictimsCopy, nil\n}\n\n// selectVictimsOnNodeByExtender checks the given nodes->pods map with predicates on extender's side.\n// Returns:\n// 1. More victim pods (if any) amended by preemption phase of extender.\n// 2. Number of violating victim (used to calculate PDB).\n// 3. Fits or not after preemption phase on extender's side.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) selectVictimsOnNodeByExtender(logger klog.Logger, pod *v1.Pod, node *framework.NodeInfo) ([]*v1.Pod, int, bool, error) {\n\t// If a extender support preemption but have no cached node info, let's run filter to make sure\n\t// default scheduler's decision still stand with given pod and node.\n\tif !f.NodeCacheCapable {\n\t\terr := f.runPredicate(pod, node)\n\t\tif err.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\treturn []*v1.Pod{}, 0, true, nil\n\t\t} else if err.IsRejected() {\n\t\t\treturn nil, 0, false, nil\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\treturn nil, 0, false, err.AsError()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Otherwise, as a extender support preemption and have cached node info, we will assume cachedNodeNameToInfo is available\n\t// and get cached node info by given node name.\n\tnodeInfoCopy := f.CachedNodeNameToInfo[node.Node().Name].Snapshot()\n\n\tvar potentialVictims []*v1.Pod\n\n\tremovePod := func(rp *v1.Pod) error {\n\t\treturn nodeInfoCopy.RemovePod(logger, rp)\n\t}\n\taddPod := func(ap *v1.Pod) {\n\t\tnodeInfoCopy.AddPod(ap)\n\t}\n\t// As the first step, remove all the lower priority pods from the node and\n\t// check if the given pod can be scheduled.\n\tpodPriority := corev1helpers.PodPriority(pod)\n\tfor _, p := range nodeInfoCopy.Pods {\n\t\tif corev1helpers.PodPriority(p.Pod) < podPriority {\n\t\t\tpotentialVictims = append(potentialVictims, p.Pod)\n\t\t\tif err := removePod(p.Pod); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, 0, false, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tsort.Slice(potentialVictims, func(i, j int) bool { return util.MoreImportantPod(potentialVictims[i], potentialVictims[j]) })\n\n\t// If the new pod does not fit after removing all the lower priority pods,\n\t// we are almost done and this node is not suitable for preemption.\n\tstatus := f.runPredicate(pod, nodeInfoCopy)\n\tif status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t// pass\n\t} else if status.IsRejected() {\n\t\t// does not fit\n\t\treturn nil, 0, false, nil\n\t} else {\n\t\t// internal errors\n\t\treturn nil, 0, false, status.AsError()\n\t}\n\n\tvar victims []*v1.Pod\n\n\t// TODO(harry): handle PDBs in the future.\n\tnumViolatingVictim := 0\n\n\treprievePod := func(p *v1.Pod) bool {\n\t\taddPod(p)\n\t\tstatus := f.runPredicate(pod, nodeInfoCopy)\n\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\tif err := removePod(p); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvictims = append(victims, p)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn status.IsSuccess()\n\t}\n\n\t// For now, assume all potential victims to be non-violating.\n\t// Now we try to reprieve non-violating victims.\n\tfor _, p := range potentialVictims {\n\t\treprievePod(p)\n\t}\n\n\treturn victims, numViolatingVictim, true, nil\n}\n\n// runPredicate run predicates of extender one by one for given pod and node.\n// Returns: fits or not.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) runPredicate(pod *v1.Pod, node *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\tfor _, predicate := range f.Predicates {\n\t\tstatus := predicate(pod, node)\n\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\treturn status\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Success)\n}\n\n// Filter implements the extender Filter function.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) Filter(pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) ([]*framework.NodeInfo, extenderv1.FailedNodesMap, extenderv1.FailedNodesMap, error) {\n\tvar filtered []*framework.NodeInfo\n\tfailedNodesMap := extenderv1.FailedNodesMap{}\n\tfailedAndUnresolvableMap := extenderv1.FailedNodesMap{}\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\tstatus := f.runPredicate(pod, node)\n\t\tif status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\tfiltered = append(filtered, node)\n\t\t} else if status.Code() == framework.Unschedulable {\n\t\t\tfailedNodesMap[node.Node().Name] = fmt.Sprintf(\"FakeExtender: node %q failed\", node.Node().Name)\n\t\t} else if status.Code() == framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable {\n\t\t\tfailedAndUnresolvableMap[node.Node().Name] = fmt.Sprintf(\"FakeExtender: node %q failed and unresolvable\", node.Node().Name)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\treturn nil, nil, nil, status.AsError()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tf.FilteredNodes = filtered\n\tif f.NodeCacheCapable {\n\t\treturn filtered, failedNodesMap, failedAndUnresolvableMap, nil\n\t}\n\treturn filtered, failedNodesMap, failedAndUnresolvableMap, nil\n}\n\n// Prioritize implements the extender Prioritize function.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) Prioritize(pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) (*extenderv1.HostPriorityList, int64, error) {\n\tresult := extenderv1.HostPriorityList{}\n\tcombinedScores := map[string]int64{}\n\tfor _, prioritizer := range f.Prioritizers {\n\t\tweight := prioritizer.Weight\n\t\tif weight == 0 {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tpriorityFunc := prioritizer.Function\n\t\tprioritizedList, err := priorityFunc(pod, nodes)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn &extenderv1.HostPriorityList{}, 0, err\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, hostEntry := range *prioritizedList {\n\t\t\tcombinedScores[hostEntry.Name] += hostEntry.Score * weight\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tfor host, score := range combinedScores {\n\t\tresult = append(result, extenderv1.HostPriority{Host: host, Score: score})\n\t}\n\treturn &result, f.Weight, nil\n}\n\n// Bind implements the extender Bind function.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) Bind(binding *v1.Binding) error {\n\tif f.Binder != nil {\n\t\treturn f.Binder()\n\t}\n\tif len(f.FilteredNodes) != 0 {\n\t\tfor _, node := range f.FilteredNodes {\n\t\t\tif node.Node().Name == binding.Target.Name {\n\t\t\t\tf.FilteredNodes = nil\n\t\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\terr := fmt.Errorf(\"Node %v not in filtered nodes %v\", binding.Target.Name, f.FilteredNodes)\n\t\tf.FilteredNodes = nil\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// IsBinder returns true indicating the extender implements the Binder function.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) IsBinder() bool {\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// IsPrioritizer returns true if there are any prioritizers.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) IsPrioritizer() bool {\n\treturn len(f.Prioritizers) > 0\n}\n\n// IsFilter returns true if there are any filters.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) IsFilter() bool {\n\treturn len(f.Predicates) > 0\n}\n\n// IsInterested returns a bool indicating whether this extender is interested in this Pod.\nfunc (f *FakeExtender) IsInterested(pod *v1.Pod) bool {\n\treturn !f.UnInterested\n}\n\nvar _ framework.Extender = &FakeExtender{}\n",

  "file": {
    "content": "\nfunc (pl *TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn pl\n}\n\n// TestScorePlugin only implements ScorePlugin interface.\ntype TestScorePlugin struct {\n\tname string\n\tinj  injectedResult\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScorePlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn pl.name\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScorePlugin) PreScore(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.PreScoreStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScorePlugin) Score(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *framework.Status) {\n\treturn setScoreRes(pl.inj)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScorePlugin) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn nil",

  "originalFile": "/*\nCopyright 2019 The Kubernetes Authors.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\npackage runtime\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\"\n\tv1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/sets\"\n\t\"k8s.io/component-base/metrics/testutil\"\n\t\"k8s.io/klog/v2/ktesting\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/apis/config\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/framework\"\n\tinternalqueue \"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/internal/queue\"\n\t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/metrics\"\n\t\"k8s.io/utils/ptr\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tpreEnqueuePlugin                  = \"preEnqueue-plugin\"\n\tqueueSortPlugin                   = \"no-op-queue-sort-plugin\"\n\tscoreWithNormalizePlugin1         = \"score-with-normalize-plugin-1\"\n\tscoreWithNormalizePlugin2         = \"score-with-normalize-plugin-2\"\n\tscorePlugin1                      = \"score-plugin-1\"\n\tscorePlugin2                      = \"score-plugin-2\"\n\tpluginNotImplementingScore        = \"plugin-not-implementing-score\"\n\tpreFilterPluginName               = \"prefilter-plugin\"\n\tpreFilterWithExtensionsPluginName = \"prefilter-with-extensions-plugin\"\n\tduplicatePluginName               = \"duplicate-plugin\"\n\ttestPlugin                        = \"test-plugin\"\n\tpermitPlugin                      = \"permit-plugin\"\n\tbindPlugin                        = \"bind-plugin\"\n\ttestCloseErrorPlugin              = \"test-close-error-plugin\"\n\n\ttestProfileName              = \"test-profile\"\n\ttestPercentageOfNodesToScore = 35\n\tnodeName                     = \"testNode\"\n\n\tinjectReason       = \"injected status\"\n\tinjectFilterReason = \"injected filter status\"\n)\n\n// TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin implements ScoreWithNormalizePlugin interface.\n// TestScorePlugin only implements ScorePlugin interface.\nvar _ framework.ScorePlugin = &TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin{}\nvar _ framework.ScorePlugin = &TestScorePlugin{}\n\nvar cmpOpts = []cmp.Option{\n\tcmp.Comparer(func(s1 *framework.Status, s2 *framework.Status) bool {\n\t\tif s1 == nil || s2 == nil {\n\t\t\treturn s1.IsSuccess() && s2.IsSuccess()\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn s1.Code() == s2.Code() && s1.Plugin() == s2.Plugin() && s1.Message() == s2.Message()\n\t}),\n}\n\nfunc newScoreWithNormalizePlugin1(_ context.Context, injArgs runtime.Object, f framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\tvar inj injectedResult\n\tif err := DecodeInto(injArgs, &inj); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin{scoreWithNormalizePlugin1, inj}, nil\n}\n\nfunc newScoreWithNormalizePlugin2(_ context.Context, injArgs runtime.Object, f framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\tvar inj injectedResult\n\tif err := DecodeInto(injArgs, &inj); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin{scoreWithNormalizePlugin2, inj}, nil\n}\n\nfunc newScorePlugin1(_ context.Context, injArgs runtime.Object, f framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\tvar inj injectedResult\n\tif err := DecodeInto(injArgs, &inj); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &TestScorePlugin{scorePlugin1, inj}, nil\n}\n\nfunc newScorePlugin2(_ context.Context, injArgs runtime.Object, f framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\tvar inj injectedResult\n\tif err := DecodeInto(injArgs, &inj); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &TestScorePlugin{scorePlugin2, inj}, nil\n}\n\nfunc newPluginNotImplementingScore(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn &PluginNotImplementingScore{}, nil\n}\n\ntype TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin struct {\n\tname string\n\tinj  injectedResult\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn pl.name\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin) NormalizeScore(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, scores framework.NodeScoreList) *framework.Status {\n\treturn injectNormalizeRes(pl.inj, scores)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin) Score(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *framework.Status) {\n\treturn setScoreRes(pl.inj)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScoreWithNormalizePlugin) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn pl\n}\n\n// TestScorePlugin only implements ScorePlugin interface.\ntype TestScorePlugin struct {\n\tname string\n\tinj  injectedResult\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScorePlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn pl.name\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScorePlugin) PreScore(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.PreScoreStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScorePlugin) Score(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *framework.Status) {\n\treturn setScoreRes(pl.inj)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestScorePlugin) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// PluginNotImplementingScore doesn't implement the ScorePlugin interface.\ntype PluginNotImplementingScore struct{}\n\nfunc (pl *PluginNotImplementingScore) Name() string {\n\treturn pluginNotImplementingScore\n}\n\nfunc newTestPlugin(_ context.Context, injArgs runtime.Object, f framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn &TestPlugin{name: testPlugin}, nil\n}\n\n// TestPlugin implements all Plugin interfaces.\ntype TestPlugin struct {\n\tname string\n\tinj  injectedResult\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) AddPod(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, podToSchedule *v1.Pod, podInfoToAdd *framework.PodInfo, nodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.PreFilterAddPodStatus), injectReason)\n}\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) RemovePod(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, podToSchedule *v1.Pod, podInfoToRemove *framework.PodInfo, nodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.PreFilterRemovePodStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn pl.name\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) Less(*framework.QueuedPodInfo, *framework.QueuedPodInfo) bool {\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) Score(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (int64, *framework.Status) {\n\treturn 0, framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.ScoreStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) ScoreExtensions() framework.ScoreExtensions {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) PreFilter(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod) (*framework.PreFilterResult, *framework.Status) {\n\treturn pl.inj.PreFilterResult, framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.PreFilterStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) PreFilterExtensions() framework.PreFilterExtensions {\n\treturn pl\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) Filter(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.FilterStatus), injectFilterReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) PostFilter(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, _ *v1.Pod, _ framework.NodeToStatusMap) (*framework.PostFilterResult, *framework.Status) {\n\treturn nil, framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.PostFilterStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) PreScore(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, pod *v1.Pod, nodes []*framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.PreScoreStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) Reserve(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.ReserveStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) Unreserve(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) {\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) PreBind(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.PreBindStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) PostBind(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) {\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) Permit(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (*framework.Status, time.Duration) {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.PermitStatus), injectReason), time.Duration(0)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPlugin) Bind(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) *framework.Status {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Code(pl.inj.BindStatus), injectReason)\n}\n\nfunc newTestCloseErrorPlugin(_ context.Context, injArgs runtime.Object, f framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn &TestCloseErrorPlugin{name: testCloseErrorPlugin}, nil\n}\n\n// TestCloseErrorPlugin implements for Close test.\ntype TestCloseErrorPlugin struct {\n\tname string\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestCloseErrorPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn pl.name\n}\n\nvar errClose = errors.New(\"close err\")\n\nfunc (pl *TestCloseErrorPlugin) Close() error {\n\treturn errClose\n}\n\n// TestPreFilterPlugin only implements PreFilterPlugin interface.\ntype TestPreFilterPlugin struct {\n\tPreFilterCalled int\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreFilterPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn preFilterPluginName\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreFilterPlugin) PreFilter(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod) (*framework.PreFilterResult, *framework.Status) {\n\tpl.PreFilterCalled++\n\treturn nil, nil\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreFilterPlugin) PreFilterExtensions() framework.PreFilterExtensions {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// TestPreFilterWithExtensionsPlugin implements Add/Remove interfaces.\ntype TestPreFilterWithExtensionsPlugin struct {\n\tPreFilterCalled int\n\tAddCalled       int\n\tRemoveCalled    int\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreFilterWithExtensionsPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn preFilterWithExtensionsPluginName\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreFilterWithExtensionsPlugin) PreFilter(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod) (*framework.PreFilterResult, *framework.Status) {\n\tpl.PreFilterCalled++\n\treturn nil, nil\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreFilterWithExtensionsPlugin) AddPod(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, podToSchedule *v1.Pod,\n\tpodInfoToAdd *framework.PodInfo, nodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\tpl.AddCalled++\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreFilterWithExtensionsPlugin) RemovePod(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, podToSchedule *v1.Pod,\n\tpodInfoToRemove *framework.PodInfo, nodeInfo *framework.NodeInfo) *framework.Status {\n\tpl.RemoveCalled++\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreFilterWithExtensionsPlugin) PreFilterExtensions() framework.PreFilterExtensions {\n\treturn pl\n}\n\ntype TestDuplicatePlugin struct {\n}\n\nfunc (dp *TestDuplicatePlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn duplicatePluginName\n}\n\nfunc (dp *TestDuplicatePlugin) PreFilter(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod) (*framework.PreFilterResult, *framework.Status) {\n\treturn nil, nil\n}\n\nfunc (dp *TestDuplicatePlugin) PreFilterExtensions() framework.PreFilterExtensions {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nvar _ framework.PreFilterPlugin = &TestDuplicatePlugin{}\n\nfunc newDuplicatePlugin(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn &TestDuplicatePlugin{}, nil\n}\n\n// TestPermitPlugin only implements PermitPlugin interface.\ntype TestPermitPlugin struct {\n\tPreFilterCalled int\n}\n\nfunc (pp *TestPermitPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn permitPlugin\n}\nfunc (pp *TestPermitPlugin) Permit(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) (*framework.Status, time.Duration) {\n\treturn framework.NewStatus(framework.Wait), 10 * time.Second\n}\n\nvar _ framework.PreEnqueuePlugin = &TestPreEnqueuePlugin{}\n\ntype TestPreEnqueuePlugin struct{}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreEnqueuePlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn preEnqueuePlugin\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestPreEnqueuePlugin) PreEnqueue(ctx context.Context, p *v1.Pod) *framework.Status {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nvar _ framework.QueueSortPlugin = &TestQueueSortPlugin{}\n\nfunc newQueueSortPlugin(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn &TestQueueSortPlugin{}, nil\n}\n\n// TestQueueSortPlugin is a no-op implementation for QueueSort extension point.\ntype TestQueueSortPlugin struct{}\n\nfunc (pl *TestQueueSortPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn queueSortPlugin\n}\n\nfunc (pl *TestQueueSortPlugin) Less(_, _ *framework.QueuedPodInfo) bool {\n\treturn false\n}\n\nvar _ framework.BindPlugin = &TestBindPlugin{}\n\nfunc newBindPlugin(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, _ framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\treturn &TestBindPlugin{}, nil\n}\n\n// TestBindPlugin is a no-op implementation for Bind extension point.\ntype TestBindPlugin struct{}\n\nfunc (t TestBindPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn bindPlugin\n}\n\nfunc (t TestBindPlugin) Bind(ctx context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) *framework.Status {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// nolint:errcheck   // Ignore the error returned by Register as before\nvar registry = func() Registry {\n\tr := make(Registry)\n\tr.Register(scoreWithNormalizePlugin1, newScoreWithNormalizePlugin1)\n\tr.Register(scoreWithNormalizePlugin2, newScoreWithNormalizePlugin2)\n\tr.Register(scorePlugin1, newScorePlugin1)\n\tr.Register(scorePlugin2, newScorePlugin2)\n\tr.Register(pluginNotImplementingScore, newPluginNotImplementingScore)\n\tr.Register(duplicatePluginName, newDuplicatePlugin)\n\tr.Register(testPlugin, newTestPlugin)\n\tr.Register(queueSortPlugin, newQueueSortPlugin)\n\tr.Register(bindPlugin, newBindPlugin)\n\tr.Register(testCloseErrorPlugin, newTestCloseErrorPlugin)\n\treturn r\n}()\n\nvar defaultWeights = map[string]int32{\n\tscoreWithNormalizePlugin1: 1,\n\tscoreWithNormalizePlugin2: 2,\n\tscorePlugin1:              1,\n}\n\nvar state = &framework.CycleState{}\n\n// Pod is only used for logging errors.\nvar pod = &v1.Pod{}\nvar node = &v1.Node{\n\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{\n\t\tName: nodeName,\n\t},\n}\nvar lowPriority, highPriority = int32(0), int32(1000)\nvar lowPriorityPod = &v1.Pod{\n\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{UID: \"low\"},\n\tSpec:       v1.PodSpec{Priority: &lowPriority},\n}\nvar highPriorityPod = &v1.Pod{\n\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{UID: \"high\"},\n\tSpec:       v1.PodSpec{Priority: &highPriority},\n}\nvar nodes = []*v1.Node{\n\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\"}},\n\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\"}},\n}\n\nvar (\n\terrInjectedStatus       = errors.New(injectReason)\n\terrInjectedFilterStatus = errors.New(injectFilterReason)\n)\n\nfunc newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx context.Context, r Registry, profile config.KubeSchedulerProfile, opts ...Option) (framework.Framework, error) {\n\tif _, ok := r[queueSortPlugin]; !ok {\n\t\tr[queueSortPlugin] = newQueueSortPlugin\n\t}\n\tif _, ok := r[bindPlugin]; !ok {\n\t\tr[bindPlugin] = newBindPlugin\n\t}\n\n\tif len(profile.Plugins.QueueSort.Enabled) == 0 {\n\t\tprofile.Plugins.QueueSort.Enabled = append(profile.Plugins.QueueSort.Enabled, config.Plugin{Name: queueSortPlugin})\n\t}\n\tif len(profile.Plugins.Bind.Enabled) == 0 {\n\t\tprofile.Plugins.Bind.Enabled = append(profile.Plugins.Bind.Enabled, config.Plugin{Name: bindPlugin})\n\t}\n\treturn NewFramework(ctx, r, &profile, opts...)\n}\n\nfunc TestInitFrameworkWithScorePlugins(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname    string\n\t\tplugins *config.Plugins\n\t\t// If initErr is true, we expect framework initialization to fail.\n\t\tinitErr bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"enabled Score plugin doesn't exist in registry\",\n\t\t\tplugins: buildScoreConfigDefaultWeights(\"notExist\"),\n\t\t\tinitErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"enabled Score plugin doesn't extend the ScorePlugin interface\",\n\t\t\tplugins: buildScoreConfigDefaultWeights(pluginNotImplementingScore),\n\t\t\tinitErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"Score plugins are nil\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"enabled Score plugin list is empty\",\n\t\t\tplugins: buildScoreConfigDefaultWeights(),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"enabled plugin only implements ScorePlugin interface\",\n\t\t\tplugins: buildScoreConfigDefaultWeights(scorePlugin1),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"enabled plugin implements ScoreWithNormalizePlugin interface\",\n\t\t\tplugins: buildScoreConfigDefaultWeights(scoreWithNormalizePlugin1),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tprofile := config.KubeSchedulerProfile{Plugins: tt.plugins}\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\t_, err := newFrameworkWithQueueSortAndBind(ctx, registry, profile)\n\t\t\tif tt.initErr && err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(\"Framework initialization should fail\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !tt.initErr && err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to create framework for testing: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestNewFrameworkErrors(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tplugins   *config.Plugins\n\t\tpluginCfg []config.PluginConfig\n\t\twantErr   string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"duplicate plugin name\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: duplicatePluginName, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: duplicatePluginName, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tpluginCfg: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: duplicatePluginName},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: \"already registered\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"duplicate plugin config\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: duplicatePluginName, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tpluginCfg: []config.PluginConfig{\n\t\t\t\t{Name: duplicatePluginName},\n\t\t\t\t{Name: duplicatePluginName},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantErr: \"repeated config for plugin\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tc := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tc.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tprofile := &config.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\tPlugins:      tc.plugins,\n\t\t\t\tPluginConfig: tc.pluginCfg,\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t_, err := NewFramework(ctx, registry, profile)\n\t\t\tif err == nil || !strings.Contains(err.Error(), tc.wantErr) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Unexpected error, got %v, expect: %s\", err, tc.wantErr)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestNewFrameworkMultiPointExpansion(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname        string\n\t\tplugins     *config.Plugins\n\t\twantPlugins *config.Plugins\n\t\twantErr     string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"plugin expansion\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 5},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tQueueSort:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tFilter:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostFilter: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreScore:   config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tScore:      config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 5}}},\n\t\t\t\tReserve:    config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPermit:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreBind:    config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tBind:       config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostBind:   config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"disable MultiPoint plugin at some extension points\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tPreScore: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tDisabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tDisabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tQueueSort:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tFilter:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostFilter: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tReserve:    config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPermit:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreBind:    config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tBind:       config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostBind:   config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Multiple MultiPoint plugins\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tQueueSort:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tFilter:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostFilter: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\tReserve:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPermit:   config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreBind:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tBind:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostBind: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"disable MultiPoint extension\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tPreScore: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tDisabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"*\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tQueueSort:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tFilter:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostFilter: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\tReserve:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPermit:   config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreBind:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tBind:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostBind: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Reorder MultiPoint plugins (specified extension takes precedence)\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scoreWithNormalizePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tQueueSort:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tFilter:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostFilter: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scoreWithNormalizePlugin1, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\tReserve:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPermit:   config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreBind:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tBind:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostBind: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Reorder MultiPoint plugins (specified extension only takes precedence when it exists in MultiPoint)\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scoreWithNormalizePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tQueueSort:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tFilter:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostFilter: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scoreWithNormalizePlugin1, Weight: 1},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\tReserve:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPermit:   config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreBind:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tBind:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostBind: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Override MultiPoint plugins weights\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1, Weight: 5},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 3},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantPlugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tQueueSort:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tFilter:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostFilter: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\tScore: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: scorePlugin1, Weight: 5},\n\t\t\t\t\t{Name: testPlugin, Weight: 3},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t\tReserve:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPermit:   config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPreBind:  config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tBind:     config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t\tPostBind: config.PluginSet{Enabled: []config.Plugin{{Name: testPlugin}}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"disable and enable MultiPoint plugins with '*'\",\n\t\t\tplugins: &config.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tMultiPoint: config.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled:
