Register only a filter plugin.\n\t\t\tfilterPlugin := &FilterPlugin{}\n\t\t\tregistry, prof := initRegistryAndConfig(t, filterPlugin)\n\n\t\t\ttestCtx, teardown := schedulerutils.InitTestSchedulerForFrameworkTest(t, testContext, 1,\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithProfiles(prof),\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithFrameworkOutOfTreeRegistry(registry))\n\t\t\tdefer teardown()\n\n\t\t\tfilterPlugin.failFilter = test.fail\n\t\t\t// Create a best effort pod.\n\t\t\tpod, err := testutils.CreatePausePod(testCtx.ClientSet,\n\t\t\t\ttestutils.InitPausePod(&testutils.PausePodConfig{Name: \"test-pod\", Namespace: testCtx.NS.Name}))\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error while creating a test pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif test.fail {\n\t\t\t\tif err = wait.PollUntilContextTimeout(testCtx.Ctx, 10*time.Millisecond, 30*time.Second, false,\n\t\t\t\t\ttestutils.PodSchedulingError(testCtx.ClientSet, pod.Namespace, pod.Name)); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected a scheduling error, but got: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif filterPlugin.numFilterCalled < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the filter plugin to be called at least 1 time, but got %v.\", filterPlugin.numFilterCalled)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tif err = testutils.WaitForPodToSchedule(testCtx.ClientSet, pod); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the pod to be scheduled. error: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif filterPlugin.numFilterCalled != 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the filter plugin to be called 1 time, but got %v.\", filterPlugin.numFilterCalled)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestPreScorePlugin tests invocation of pre-score plugins.\nfunc TestPreScorePlugin(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestContext := testutils.InitTestAPIServer(t, \"pre-score-plugin\", nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname string\n\t\tfail bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"fail preScore plugin\",\n\t\t\tfail: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"do not fail preScore plugin\",\n\t\t\tfail: false,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, test := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t// Create a plugin registry for testing. Register only a pre-score plugin.\n\t\t\tpreScorePlugin := &PreScorePlugin{}\n\t\t\tregistry, prof := initRegistryAndConfig(t, preScorePlugin)\n\n\t\t\ttestCtx, teardown := schedulerutils.InitTestSchedulerForFrameworkTest(t, testContext, 2,\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithProfiles(prof),\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithFrameworkOutOfTreeRegistry(registry))\n\t\t\tdefer teardown()\n\n\t\t\tpreScorePlugin.failPreScore = test.fail\n\t\t\t// Create a best effort pod.\n\t\t\tpod, err := testutils.CreatePausePod(testCtx.ClientSet,\n\t\t\t\ttestutils.InitPausePod(&testutils.PausePodConfig{Name: \"test-pod\", Namespace: testCtx.NS.Name}))\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error while creating a test pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif test.fail {\n\t\t\t\tif err = wait.PollUntilContextTimeout(testCtx.Ctx, 10*time.Millisecond, 30*time.Second, false,\n\t\t\t\t\ttestutils.PodSchedulingError(testCtx.ClientSet, pod.Namespace, pod.Name)); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected a scheduling error, but got: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tif err = testutils.WaitForPodToSchedule(testCtx.ClientSet, pod); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the pod to be scheduled. error: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif preScorePlugin.numPreScoreCalled == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the pre-score plugin to be called.\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestPreEnqueuePlugin tests invocation of enqueue plugins.\nfunc TestPreEnqueuePlugin(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestContext := testutils.InitTestAPIServer(t, \"enqueue-plugin\", nil)\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname         string\n\t\tpod          *v1.Pod\n\t\tadmitEnqueue bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"pod is admitted to enqueue\",\n\t\t\tpod:          st.MakePod().Name(\"p\").Namespace(testContext.NS.Name).Container(\"pause\").Obj(),\n\t\t\tadmitEnqueue: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"pod is not admitted to enqueue\",\n\t\t\tpod:          st.MakePod().Name(\"p\").Namespace(testContext.NS.Name).SchedulingGates([]string{\"foo\"}).Container(\"pause\").Obj(),\n\t\t\tadmitEnqueue: false,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t// Create a plugin registry for testing. Register only a filter plugin.\n\t\t\tenqueuePlugin := &PreEnqueuePlugin{}\n\t\t\t// Plumb a preFilterPlugin to verify if it's called or not.\n\t\t\tpreFilterPlugin := &PreFilterPlugin{}\n\t\t\tregistry, prof := initRegistryAndConfig(t, enqueuePlugin, preFilterPlugin)\n\n\t\t\ttestCtx, teardown := schedulerutils.InitTestSchedulerForFrameworkTest(t, testContext, 1,\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithProfiles(prof),\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithFrameworkOutOfTreeRegistry(registry))\n\t\t\tdefer teardown()\n\n\t\t\tenqueuePlugin.admit = tt.admitEnqueue\n\t\t\t// Create a best effort pod.\n\t\t\tpod, err := testutils.CreatePausePod(testCtx.ClientSet, tt.pod)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error while creating a test pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif tt.admitEnqueue {\n\t\t\t\tif err := testutils.WaitForPodToScheduleWithTimeout(testCtx.ClientSet, pod, 10*time.Second); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the pod to be schedulable, but got: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t// Also verify enqueuePlugin is called.\n\t\t\t\tif enqueuePlugin.called == 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the enqueuePlugin plugin to be called at least once, but got 0\")\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tif err := testutils.WaitForPodSchedulingGated(testCtx.ClientSet, pod, 10*time.Second); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the pod to be scheduling waiting, but got: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t// Also verify preFilterPlugin is not called.\n\t\t\t\tif preFilterPlugin.numPreFilterCalled != 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the preFilter plugin not to be called, but got %v\", preFilterPlugin.numPreFilterCalled)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestPreemptWithPermitPlugin tests preempt with permit plugins.\n// It verifies how waitingPods behave in different scenarios:\n// - when waitingPods get preempted\n//   - they should be removed from internal waitingPods map, but not physically deleted\n//   - it'd trigger moving unschedulable Pods, but not the waitingPods themselves\n//\n// - when waitingPods get deleted externally, it'd trigger moving unschedulable Pods\nfunc TestPreemptWithPermitPlugin(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestContext := testutils.InitTestAPIServer(t, \"preempt-with-permit-plugin\", nil)\n\n\tns := testContext.NS.Name\n\tlowPriority, highPriority := int32(100), int32(300)\n\tresReq := map[v1.ResourceName]string{\n\t\tv1.ResourceCPU:    \"200m\",\n\t\tv1.ResourceMemory: \"200\",\n\t}\n\tpreemptorReq := map[v1.ResourceName]string{\n\t\tv1.ResourceCPU:    \"400m\",\n\t\tv1.ResourceMemory: \"400\",\n\t}\n\n\tnodeRes := map[v1.ResourceName]string{\n\t\tv1.ResourcePods:   \"32\",\n\t\tv1.ResourceCPU:    \"500m\",\n\t\tv1.ResourceMemory: \"500\",\n\t}\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname                   string\n\t\tdeleteWaitingPod       bool\n\t\tmaxNumWaitingPodCalled int\n\t\trunningPod             *v1.Pod\n\t\twaitingPod             *v1.Pod\n\t\tpreemptor              *v1.Pod\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                   \"waiting pod is not physically deleted upon preemption\",\n\t\t\tmaxNumWaitingPodCalled: 2,\n\t\t\trunningPod:             st.MakePod().Name(\"running-pod\").Namespace(ns).Priority(lowPriority).Req(resReq).ZeroTerminationGracePeriod().Obj(),\n\t\t\twaitingPod:             st.MakePod().Name(\"waiting-pod\").Namespace(ns).Priority(lowPriority).Req(resReq).ZeroTerminationGracePeriod().Obj(),\n\t\t\tpreemptor:              st.MakePod().Name(\"preemptor-pod\").Namespace(ns).Priority(highPriority).Req(preemptorReq).ZeroTerminationGracePeriod().Obj(),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\t// The waiting Pod has once gone through the scheduling cycle,\n\t\t\t// and we don't know if it's schedulable or not after it's preempted.\n\t\t\t// So, we should retry the scheduling of it so that it won't stuck in the unschedulable Pod pool.\n\t\t\tname:                   \"rejecting a waiting pod to trigger retrying unschedulable pods immediately, and the waiting pod itself will be retried\",\n\t\t\tmaxNumWaitingPodCalled: 2,\n\t\t\twaitingPod:             st.MakePod().Name(\"waiting-pod\").Namespace(ns).Priority(lowPriority).Req(resReq).ZeroTerminationGracePeriod().Obj(),\n\t\t\tpreemptor:              st.MakePod().Name(\"preemptor-pod\").Namespace(ns).Priority(highPriority).Req(preemptorReq).ZeroTerminationGracePeriod().Obj(),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:                   \"deleting a waiting pod to trigger retrying unschedulable pods immediately\",\n\t\t\tdeleteWaitingPod:       true,\n\t\t\tmaxNumWaitingPodCalled: 1,\n\t\t\twaitingPod:             st.MakePod().Name(\"waiting-pod\").Namespace(ns).Priority(lowPriority).Req(resReq).ZeroTerminationGracePeriod().Obj(),\n\t\t\tpreemptor:              st.MakePod().Name(\"preemptor-pod\").Namespace(ns).Priority(lowPriority).Req(preemptorReq).ZeroTerminationGracePeriod().Obj(),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t// Create a plugin registry for testing. Register a permit and a filter plugin.\n\t\t\tpermitPlugin := &PermitPlugin{}\n\t\t\t// Inject a fake filter plugin to use its internal `numFilterCalled` to verify\n\t\t\t// how many times a Pod gets tried scheduling.\n\t\t\tfilterPlugin := &FilterPlugin{numCalledPerPod: make(map[string]int)}\n\t\t\tregistry := frameworkruntime.Registry{\n\t\t\t\tpermitPluginName: newPlugin(permitPlugin),\n\t\t\t\tfilterPluginName: newPlugin(filterPlugin),\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Setup initial permit and filter plugins in the profile.\n\t\t\tcfg := configtesting.V1ToInternalWithDefaults(t, configv1.KubeSchedulerConfiguration{\n\t\t\t\tProfiles: []configv1.KubeSchedulerProfile{\n\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: pointer.String(v1.DefaultSchedulerName),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &configv1.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPermit: configv1.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []configv1.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: permitPluginName},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFilter: configv1.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// Ensure the fake filter plugin is always called; otherwise noderesources\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// would fail first and exit the Filter phase.\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []configv1.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: filterPluginName},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: noderesources.Name},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tDisabled: []configv1.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: noderesources.Name},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t})\n\n\t\t\ttestCtx, teardown := schedulerutils.InitTestSchedulerForFrameworkTest(t, testContext, 0,\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithProfiles(cfg.Profiles...),\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithFrameworkOutOfTreeRegistry(registry),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t\tdefer teardown()\n\n\t\t\t_, err := testutils.CreateAndWaitForNodesInCache(testCtx, \"test-node\", st.MakeNode().Capacity(nodeRes), 1)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tpermitPlugin.waitAndAllowPermit = true\n\t\t\tpermitPlugin.waitingPod = \"waiting-pod\"\n\n\t\t\tif r := tt.runningPod; r != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, err := testutils.CreatePausePod(testCtx.ClientSet, r); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Error while creating the running pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t// Wait until the pod to be scheduled.\n\t\t\t\tif err = testutils.WaitForPodToSchedule(testCtx.ClientSet, r); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"The running pod is expected to be scheduled: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif w := tt.waitingPod; w != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, err := testutils.CreatePausePod(testCtx.ClientSet, w); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Error while creating the waiting pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t// Wait until the waiting-pod is actually waiting.\n\t\t\t\tif err := wait.PollUntilContextTimeout(testCtx.Ctx, 10*time.Millisecond, 30*time.Second, false, func(ctx context.Context) (bool, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tw := false\n\t\t\t\t\tpermitPlugin.fh.IterateOverWaitingPods(func(wp framework.WaitingPod) { w = true })\n\t\t\t\t\treturn w, nil\n\t\t\t\t}); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"The waiting pod is expected to be waiting: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif p := tt.preemptor; p != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, err := testutils.CreatePausePod(testCtx.ClientSet, p); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Error while creating the preemptor pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t// Delete the waiting pod if specified.\n\t\t\t\tif w := tt.waitingPod; w != nil && tt.deleteWaitingPod {\n\t\t\t\t\tif err := testutils.DeletePod(testCtx.ClientSet, w.Name, w.Namespace); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Error while deleting the waiting pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif err = testutils.WaitForPodToSchedule(testCtx.ClientSet, p); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected the preemptor pod to be scheduled. error: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif w := tt.waitingPod; w != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif err := wait.PollUntilContextTimeout(testCtx.Ctx, 200*time.Millisecond, wait.ForeverTestTimeout, false, func(ctx context.Context) (bool, error) {\n\t\t\t\t\tw := false\n\t\t\t\t\tpermitPlugin.fh.IterateOverWaitingPods(func(wp framework.WaitingPod) { w = true })\n\t\t\t\t\treturn !w, nil\n\t\t\t\t}); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected the waiting pod to get preempted.\")\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tp := filterPlugin.deepCopy()\n\t\t\t\twaitingPodCalled := p.numCalledPerPod[fmt.Sprintf(\"%v/%v\", w.Namespace, w.Name)]\n\t\t\t\tif waitingPodCalled > tt.maxNumWaitingPodCalled {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected the waiting pod to be called %v times at most, but got %v\", tt.maxNumWaitingPodCalled, waitingPodCalled)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tif !tt.deleteWaitingPod {\n\t\t\t\t\t// Expect the waitingPod to be still present.\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, err := testutils.GetPod(testCtx.ClientSet, w.Name, w.Namespace); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"Get waiting pod in waiting pod failed.\")\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tif permitPlugin.numPermitCalled == 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the permit plugin to be called.\")\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif r := tt.runningPod; r != nil {\n\t\t\t\t// Expect the runningPod to be deleted physically.\n\t\t\t\tif _, err = testutils.GetPod(testCtx.ClientSet, r.Name, r.Namespace); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"The running pod still exists.\")\n\t\t\t\t} else if !errors.IsNotFound(err) {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Get running pod failed: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nconst (\n\tjobPluginName = \"job plugin\"\n)\n\nvar _ framework.PreFilterPlugin = &JobPlugin{}\nvar _ framework.PostBindPlugin = &PostBindPlugin{}\n\ntype JobPlugin struct {\n\tpodLister     listersv1.PodLister\n\tpodsActivated bool\n}\n\nfunc (j *JobPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn jobPluginName\n}\n\nfunc (j *JobPlugin) PreFilter(_ context.Context, _ *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod) (*framework.PreFilterResult, *framework.Status) {\n\tlabelSelector := labels.SelectorFromSet(labels.Set{\"driver\": \"\"})\n\tdriverPods, err := j.podLister.Pods(p.Namespace).List(labelSelector)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, framework.AsStatus(err)\n\t}\n\tif len(driverPods) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, framework.NewStatus(framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable, \"unable to find driver pod\")\n\t}\n\treturn nil, nil\n}\n\nfunc (j *JobPlugin) PreFilterExtensions() framework.PreFilterExtensions {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (j *JobPlugin) PostBind(_ context.Context, state *framework.CycleState, p *v1.Pod, nodeName string) {\n\tif _, ok := p.Labels[\"driver\"]; !ok {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// If it's a driver pod, move other executor pods proactively to accelerating the scheduling.\n\tlabelSelector := labels.SelectorFromSet(labels.Set{\"executor\": \"\"})\n\tpodsToActivate, err := j.podLister.Pods(p.Namespace).List(labelSelector)\n\tif err == nil && len(podsToActivate) != 0 {\n\t\tc, err := state.Read(framework.PodsToActivateKey)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tif s, ok := c.(*framework.PodsToActivate); ok {\n\t\t\t\ts.Lock()\n\t\t\t\tfor _, pod := range podsToActivate {\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespacedName := fmt.Sprintf(\"%v/%v\", pod.Namespace, pod.Name)\n\t\t\t\t\ts.Map[namespacedName] = pod\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\ts.Unlock()\n\t\t\t\tj.podsActivated = true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// This test simulates a typical spark job workflow.\n//   - N executor pods are created, but kept pending due to missing the driver pod\n//   - when the driver pod gets created and scheduled, proactively move the executors to activeQ\n//     and thus accelerate the entire job workflow.\nfunc TestActivatePods(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar jobPlugin *JobPlugin\n\t// Create a plugin registry for testing. Register a Job plugin.\n\tregistry := frameworkruntime.Registry{jobPluginName: func(_ context.Context, _ runtime.Object, fh framework.Handle) (framework.Plugin, error) {\n\t\tjobPlugin = &JobPlugin{podLister: fh.SharedInformerFactory().Core().V1().Pods().Lister()}\n\t\treturn jobPlugin, nil\n\t}}\n\n\t// Setup initial filter plugin for testing.\n\tcfg := configtesting.V1ToInternalWithDefaults(t, configv1.KubeSchedulerConfiguration{\n\t\tProfiles: []configv1.KubeSchedulerProfile{{\n\t\t\tSchedulerName: pointer.String(v1.DefaultSchedulerName),\n\t\t\tPlugins: &configv1.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\tPreFilter: configv1.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []configv1.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: jobPluginName},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tPostBind: configv1.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []configv1.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: jobPluginName},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}},\n\t})\n\n\t// Create the API server and the scheduler with the test plugin set.\n\ttestCtx, _ := schedulerutils.InitTestSchedulerForFrameworkTest(t, testutils.InitTestAPIServer(t, \"job-plugin\", nil), 1,\n\t\tscheduler.WithProfiles(cfg.Profiles...),\n\t\tscheduler.WithFrameworkOutOfTreeRegistry(registry))\n\n\tcs := testCtx.ClientSet\n\tns := testCtx.NS.Name\n\tpause := imageutils.GetPauseImageName()\n\n\t// Firstly create 2 executor pods.\n\tvar pods []*v1.Pod\n\tfor i := 1; i <= 2; i++ {\n\t\tname := fmt.Sprintf(\"executor-%v\", i)\n\t\texecutor := st.MakePod().Name(name).Namespace(ns).Label(\"executor\", \"\").Container(pause).Obj()\n\t\tpods = append(pods, executor)\n\t\tif _, err := cs.CoreV1().Pods(executor.Namespace).Create(context.TODO(), executor, metav1.CreateOptions{}); err != nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to create pod %v: %v\", executor.Name, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Wait for the 2 executor pods to be unschedulable.\n\tfor _, pod := range pods {\n\t\tif err := testutils.WaitForPodUnschedulable(cs, pod); err != nil {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Failed to wait for Pod %v to be unschedulable: %v\", pod.Name, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Create a driver pod.\n\tdriver := st.MakePod().Name(\"driver\").Namespace(ns).Label(\"driver\", \"\").Container(pause).Obj()\n\tpods = append(pods, driver)\n\tif _, err := cs.CoreV1().Pods(driver.Namespace).Create(context.TODO(), driver, metav1.CreateOptions{}); err != nil {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to create pod %v: %v\", driver.Name, err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify all pods to be scheduled.\n\tfor _, pod := range pods {\n\t\tif err := testutils.WaitForPodToScheduleWithTimeout(cs, pod, wait.ForeverTestTimeout); err != nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to wait for Pod %v to be schedulable: %v\", pod.Name, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Lastly verify the pods activation logic is really called.\n\tif jobPlugin.podsActivated == false {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"JobPlugin's pods activation logic is not called\")\n\t}\n}\n\nvar _ framework.PreEnqueuePlugin = &SchedulingGatesPluginWithEvents{}\nvar _ framework.EnqueueExtensions = &SchedulingGatesPluginWithEvents{}\nvar _ framework.PreEnqueuePlugin = &SchedulingGatesPluginWOEvents{}\nvar _ framework.EnqueueExtensions = &SchedulingGatesPluginWOEvents{}\n\nconst (\n\tschedulingGatesPluginWithEvents = \"scheduling-gates-with-events\"\n\tschedulingGatesPluginWOEvents   = \"scheduling-gates-without-events\"\n)\n\ntype SchedulingGatesPluginWithEvents struct {\n\tcalled int\n\tschedulinggates.SchedulingGates\n}\n\nfunc (pl *SchedulingGatesPluginWithEvents) Name() string {\n\treturn schedulingGatesPluginWithEvents\n}\n\nfunc (pl *SchedulingGatesPluginWithEvents) PreEnqueue(ctx context.Context, p *v1.Pod) *framework.Status {\n\tpl.called++\n\treturn pl.SchedulingGates.PreEnqueue(ctx, p)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *SchedulingGatesPluginWithEvents) EventsToRegister() []framework.ClusterEventWithHint {\n\treturn []framework.ClusterEventWithHint{\n\t\t{Event: framework.ClusterEvent{Resource: framework.Pod, ActionType: framework.Update}},\n\t}\n}\n\ntype SchedulingGatesPluginWOEvents struct {\n\tcalled int\n\tschedulinggates.SchedulingGates\n}\n\nfunc (pl *SchedulingGatesPluginWOEvents) Name() string {\n\treturn schedulingGatesPluginWOEvents\n}\n\nfunc (pl *SchedulingGatesPluginWOEvents) PreEnqueue(ctx context.Context, p *v1.Pod) *framework.Status {\n\tpl.called++\n\treturn pl.SchedulingGates.PreEnqueue(ctx, p)\n}\n\nfunc (pl *SchedulingGatesPluginWOEvents) EventsToRegister() []framework.ClusterEventWithHint {\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// This test helps to verify registering nil events for schedulingGates plugin works as expected.\nfunc TestSchedulingGatesPluginEventsToRegister(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestContext := testutils.InitTestAPIServer(t, \"preenqueue-plugin\", nil)\n\n\tnum := func(pl framework.Plugin) int {\n\t\tswitch item := pl.(type) {\n\t\tcase *SchedulingGatesPluginWithEvents:\n\t\t\treturn item.called\n\t\tcase *SchedulingGatesPluginWOEvents:\n\t\t\treturn item.called\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tt.Error(\"unsupported plugin\")\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn 0\n\t}\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname          string\n\t\tenqueuePlugin framework.PreEnqueuePlugin\n\t\tcount         int\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:          \"preEnqueue plugin without event registered\",\n\t\t\tenqueuePlugin: &SchedulingGatesPluginWOEvents{SchedulingGates: schedulinggates.SchedulingGates{}},\n\t\t\tcount:         2,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:          \"preEnqueue plugin with event registered\",\n\t\t\tenqueuePlugin: &SchedulingGatesPluginWithEvents{SchedulingGates: schedulinggates.SchedulingGates{}},\n\t\t\tcount:         3,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tregistry := frameworkruntime.Registry{\n\t\t\t\ttt.enqueuePlugin.Name(): newPlugin(tt.enqueuePlugin),\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Setup plugins for testing.\n\t\t\tcfg := configtesting.V1ToInternalWithDefaults(t, configv1.KubeSchedulerConfiguration{\n\t\t\t\tProfiles: []configv1.KubeSchedulerProfile{{\n\t\t\t\t\tSchedulerName: pointer.String(v1.DefaultSchedulerName),\n\t\t\t\t\tPlugins: &configv1.Plugins{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPreEnqueue: configv1.PluginSet{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEnabled: []configv1.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: tt.enqueuePlugin.Name()},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tDisabled: []configv1.Plugin{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{Name: \"*\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}},\n\t\t\t})\n\n\t\t\ttestCtx, teardown := schedulerutils.InitTestSchedulerForFrameworkTest(t, testContext, 2,\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithProfiles(cfg.Profiles...),\n\t\t\t\tscheduler.WithFrameworkOutOfTreeRegistry(registry),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t\tdefer teardown()\n\n\t\t\t// Create a pod with schedulingGates.\n\t\t\tgatedPod := st.MakePod().Name(\"p\").Namespace(testContext.NS.Name).\n\t\t\t\tSchedulingGates([]string{\"foo\"}).\n\t\t\t\tPodAffinity(\"kubernetes.io/hostname\", &metav1.LabelSelector{MatchLabels: map[string]string{\"foo\": \"bar\"}}, st.PodAffinityWithRequiredReq).\n\t\t\t\tContainer(\"pause\").Obj()\n\t\t\tgatedPod, err := testutils.CreatePausePod(testCtx.ClientSet, gatedPod)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error while creating a gated pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif err := testutils.WaitForPodSchedulingGated(testCtx.ClientSet, gatedPod, 10*time.Second); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the pod to be gated, but got: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif num(tt.enqueuePlugin) != 1 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the preEnqueue plugin to be called once, but got %v\", num(tt.enqueuePlugin))\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Create a best effort pod.\n\t\t\tpausePod, err := testutils.CreatePausePod(testCtx.ClientSet, testutils.InitPausePod(&testutils.PausePodConfig{\n\t\t\t\tName:      \"pause-pod\",\n\t\t\t\tNamespace: testCtx.NS.Name,\n\t\t\t\tLabels:    map[string]string{\"foo\": \"bar\"},\n\t\t\t}))\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error while creating a pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Wait for the pod schedulabled.\n\t\t\tif err := testutils.WaitForPodToScheduleWithTimeout(testCtx.ClientSet, pausePod, 10*time.Second); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the pod to be schedulable, but got: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Update the pod which will trigger the requeue logic if plugin registers the events.\n\t\t\tpausePod, err = testCtx.ClientSet.CoreV1().Pods(pausePod.Namespace).Get(testCtx.Ctx, pausePod.Name, metav1.GetOptions{})\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error while getting a pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tpausePod.Annotations = map[string]string{\"foo\": \"bar\"}\n\t\t\t_, err = testCtx.ClientSet.CoreV1().Pods(pausePod.Namespace).Update(testCtx.Ctx, pausePod, metav1.UpdateOptions{})\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error while updating a pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Pod should still be unschedulable because scheduling gates still exist, theoretically, it's a waste rescheduling.\n\t\t\tif err := testutils.WaitForPodSchedulingGated(testCtx.ClientSet, gatedPod, 10*time.Second); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the pod to be gated, but got: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif num(tt.enqueuePlugin) != tt.count {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the preEnqueue plugin to be called %v, but got %v\", tt.count, num(tt.enqueuePlugin))\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Remove gated pod's scheduling gates.\n\t\t\tgatedPod, err = testCtx.ClientSet.CoreV1().Pods(gatedPod.Namespace).Get(testCtx.Ctx, gatedPod.Name, metav1.GetOptions{})\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error while getting a pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tgatedPod.Spec.SchedulingGates = nil\n\t\t\t_, err = testCtx.ClientSet.CoreV1().Pods(gatedPod.Namespace).Update(testCtx.Ctx, gatedPod, metav1.UpdateOptions{})\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error while updating a pod: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Ungated pod should be schedulable now.\n\t\t\tif err := testutils.WaitForPodToScheduleWithTimeout(testCtx.ClientSet, gatedPod, 10*time.Second); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected the pod to be schedulable, but got: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "   return nil",
        " }",

        "   return sp",

      "oldStart": 364
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

[]string{\"{{.bad-value.}}\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTopologyKey: \"region\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tinvalidAntiAffinityLabels := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAntiAffinity: &v1.PodAntiAffinity{\n\t\t\tPreferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.WeightedPodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tWeight: 5,\n\t\t\t\t\tPodAffinityTerm: v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"security\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"{{.bad-value.}}\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTopologyKey: \"az\",\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tpod                                *v1.Pod\n\t\tpods                               []*v1.Pod\n\t\tnodes                              []*v1.Node\n\t\texpectedList                       framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\tname                               string\n\t\tignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods bool\n\t\twantStatus                         *framework.Status\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"all nodes are same priority as Affinity is nil\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t},\n\t\t// the node(node1) that have the label {\"region\": \"China\"} (match the topology key) and that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get high score\n\t\t// the node(node3) that don't have the label {\"region\": \"whatever the value is\"} (mismatch the topology key) but that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get low score\n\t\t// the node(node2) that have the label {\"region\": \"China\"} (match the topology key) but that have existing pods that mismatch the labelSelector get low score\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity: pod that matches topology key & pods in nodes will get high score comparing to others\" +\n\t\t\t\t\"which doesn't match either pods in nodes or in topology key\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// the node1(node1) that have the label {\"region\": \"China\"} (match the topology key) and that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get high score\n\t\t// the node2(node2) that have the label {\"region\": \"China\"}, match the topology key and have the same label value with node1, get the same high score with node1\n\t\t// the node3(node3) that have the label {\"region\": \"India\"}, match the topology key but have a different label value, don't have existing pods that match the labelSelector,\n\t\t// get a low score.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"All the nodes that have the same topology key & label value with one of them has an existing pod that match the affinity rules, have the same score\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegion}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChinaAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// there are 2 regions, say regionChina(node1,node3,node4) and regionIndia(node2,node5), both regions have nodes that match the preference.\n\t\t// But there are more nodes(actually more existing pods) in regionChina that match the preference than regionIndia.\n\t\t// Then, nodes in regionChina get higher score than nodes in regionIndia, and all the nodes in regionChina should get a same score(high score),\n\t\t// while all the nodes in regionIndia should get another same score(low score).\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity: nodes in one region has more matching pods comparing to other region, so the region which has more matches will get high score\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node4\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node5\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node4\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node5\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node4\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node5\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Test with the different operators and values for pod affinity scheduling preference, including some match failures.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity: different Label operators and values for pod affinity scheduling preference, including some match failures \",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: affinity3}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 20}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Test the symmetry cases for affinity, the difference between affinity and symmetry is not the pod wants to run together with some existing pods,\n\t\t// but the existing pods have the inter pod affinity preference while the pod to schedule satisfy the preference.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity symmetry: considered only the preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution in pod affinity symmetry\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity symmetry with namespace selector\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: affinityNamespaceSelector}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"AntiAffinity symmetry with namespace selector\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: antiAffinityNamespaceSelector}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity symmetry: considered RequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution in pod affinity symmetry\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardAffinity}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardAffinity}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t// The pod to schedule prefer to stay away from some existing pods at node level using the pod anti affinity.\n\t\t// the nodes that have the label {\"node\": \"bar\"} (match the topology key) and that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get low score\n\t\t// the nodes that don't have the label {\"node\": \"whatever the value is\"} (mismatch the topology key) but that have existing pods that match the labelSelector get high score\n\t\t// the nodes that have the label {\"node\": \"bar\"} (match the topology key) but that have existing pods that mismatch the labelSelector get high score\n\t\t// there are 2 nodes, say node1 and node2, both nodes have pods that match the labelSelector and have topology-key in node.Labels.\n\t\t// But there are more pods on node1 that match the preference than node2. Then, node1 get a lower score than node2.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Anti Affinity: pod that does not match existing pods in node will get high score \",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Anti Affinity: pod that does not match topology key & match the pods in nodes will get higher score comparing to others \",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Anti Affinity: one node has more matching pods comparing to other node, so the node which has more unmatches will get high score\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Test the symmetry cases for anti affinity\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Anti Affinity symmetry: the existing pods in node which has anti affinity match will get high score\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: awayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelAzAz2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Test both  affinity and anti-affinity\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity and Anti Affinity: considered only preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution in both pod affinity & anti affinity\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Combined cases considering both affinity and anti-affinity, the pod to schedule and existing pods have the same labels (they are in the same RC/service),\n\t\t// the pod prefer to run together with its brother pods in the same region, but wants to stay away from them at node level,\n\t\t// so that all the pods of a RC/service can stay in a same region but trying to separate with each other\n\t\t// node-1,node-3,node-4 are in ChinaRegion others node-2,node-5 are in IndiaRegion\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity and Anti Affinity: considering both affinity and anti-affinity, the pod to schedule and existing pods have the same labels\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node4\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node5\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChinaAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node4\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node5\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node4\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node5\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Consider Affinity, Anti Affinity and symmetry together.\n\t\t// for Affinity, the weights are:                8,  0,  0,  0\n\t\t// for Anti Affinity, the weights are:           0, -5,  0,  0\n\t\t// for Affinity symmetry, the weights are:       0,  0,  8,  0\n\t\t// for Anti Affinity symmetry, the weights are:  0,  0,  0, -5\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity and Anti Affinity and symmetry: considered only preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution in both pod affinity & anti affinity & symmetry\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node3\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node4\", Affinity: awayFromS1InAz}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node4\", Labels: labelAzAz2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node4\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t// Cover https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/82796 which panics upon:\n\t\t// 1. Some nodes in a topology don't have pods with affinity, but other nodes in the same topology have.\n\t\t// 2. The incoming pod doesn't have affinity.\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Avoid panic when partial nodes in a topology don't have pods with affinity\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"invalid Affinity fails PreScore\",\n\t\t\tpod:        &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: invalidAffinityLabels}},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Error, `Invalid value: \"{{.bad-value.}}\"`),\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"invalid AntiAffinity fails PreScore\",\n\t\t\tpod:        &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\", Affinity: invalidAntiAffinityLabels}},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Error, `Invalid value: \"{{.bad-value.}}\"`),\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity with pods matching NamespaceSelector\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{Affinity: affinityNamespaceSelector}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team2\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam2.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity with pods matching both NamespaceSelector and Namespaces fields\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{Affinity: affinityNamespaceSelector}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam2.team2\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam2.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity with pods matching NamespaceSelector\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{Affinity: antiAffinityNamespaceSelector}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team2\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam2.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Affinity with pods matching both NamespaceSelector and Namespaces fields\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{Affinity: antiAffinityNamespaceSelector}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam2.team2\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam2.team1\", Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList: []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Ignore preferred terms of existing pods\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList:                       []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t\twantStatus:                         framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t\tignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Do not ignore preferred terms of existing pods\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: stayWithS1InRegionAwayFromS2InAz}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS1}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: stayWithS2InRegion}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\texpectedList:                       []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: 0}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}},\n\t\t\tignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: false,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:       \"No nodes to score\",\n\t\t\tpod:        &v1.Pod{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"\"}, ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelSecurityS2}},\n\t\t\tpods:       []*v1.Pod{},\n\t\t\tnodes:      []*v1.Node{},\n\t\t\twantStatus: framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, test := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tstate := framework.NewCycleState()\n\t\t\tp := plugintesting.SetupPluginWithInformers(ctx, t, New, &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{HardPodAffinityWeight: 1, IgnorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods: test.ignorePreferredTermsOfExistingPods}, cache.NewSnapshot(test.pods, test.nodes), namespaces)\n\t\t\tstatus := p.(framework.PreScorePlugin).PreScore(ctx, state, test.pod, tf.BuildNodeInfos(test.nodes))\n\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\tif status.Code() != test.wantStatus.Code() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"InterPodAffinity#PreScore() returned unexpected status.Code got: %v, want: %v\", status.Code(), test.wantStatus.Code())\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tif !strings.Contains(status.Message(), test.wantStatus.Message()) {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"InterPodAffinity#PreScore() returned unexpected status.Message got: %v, want: %v\", status.Message(), test.wantStatus.Message())\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar gotList framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\t\tfor _, n := range test.nodes {\n\t\t\t\tnodeName := n.ObjectMeta.Name\n\t\t\t\tscore, status := p.(framework.ScorePlugin).Score(ctx, state, test.pod, nodeName)\n\t\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error from Score: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tgotList = append(gotList, framework.NodeScore{Name: nodeName, Score: score})\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstatus = p.(framework.ScorePlugin).ScoreExtensions().NormalizeScore(ctx, state, test.pod, gotList)\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error from NormalizeScore: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(test.expectedList, gotList); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"node score list doesn't match (-want,+got): \\n %s\", diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestPreferredAffinityWithHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight(t *testing.T) {\n\tpodLabelServiceS1 := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"service\": \"S1\",\n\t}\n\tlabelRgChina := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"region\": \"China\",\n\t}\n\tlabelRgIndia := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"region\": \"India\",\n\t}\n\tlabelAzAz1 := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"az\": \"az1\",\n\t}\n\thardPodAffinity := &v1.Affinity{\n\t\tPodAffinity: &v1.PodAffinity{\n\t\t\tRequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: []v1.PodAffinityTerm{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tLabelSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"service\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"S1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaces: []string{\"\", \"subteam2.team2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceSelector: &metav1.LabelSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []metav1.LabelSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:      \"team\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: metav1.LabelSelectorOpIn,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValues:   []string{\"team1\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tTopologyKey: \"region\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tpod                   *v1.Pod\n\t\tpods                  []*v1.Pod\n\t\tnodes                 []*v1.Node\n\t\thardPodAffinityWeight int32\n\t\texpectedList          framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\tname                  string\n\t\twantStatus            *framework.Status\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with default weight\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: v1.DefaultHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight,\n\t\t\texpectedList:          []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with zero weight\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: 0,\n\t\t\twantStatus:            framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with no matching namespace\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team2\", Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: v1.DefaultHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight,\n\t\t\twantStatus:            framework.NewStatus(framework.Skip),\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with matching NamespaceSelector\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam1.team1\", Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: v1.DefaultHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight,\n\t\t\texpectedList:          []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"with matching Namespaces\",\n\t\t\tpod:  &v1.Pod{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Namespace: \"subteam2.team2\", Labels: podLabelServiceS1}},\n\t\t\tpods: []*v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node1\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t\t{Spec: v1.PodSpec{NodeName: \"node2\", Affinity: hardPodAffinity}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tnodes: []*v1.Node{\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node1\", Labels: labelRgChina}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node2\", Labels: labelRgIndia}},\n\t\t\t\t{ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: \"node3\", Labels: labelAzAz1}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\thardPodAffinityWeight: v1.DefaultHardPodAffinitySymmetricWeight,\n\t\t\texpectedList:          []framework.NodeScore{{Name: \"node1\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node2\", Score: framework.MaxNodeScore}, {Name: \"node3\", Score: 0}},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, test := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\t_, ctx := ktesting.NewTestContext(t)\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\t\t\tstate := framework.NewCycleState()\n\t\t\tp := plugintesting.SetupPluginWithInformers(ctx, t, New, &config.InterPodAffinityArgs{HardPodAffinityWeight: test.hardPodAffinityWeight}, cache.NewSnapshot(test.pods, test.nodes), namespaces)\n\t\t\tstatus := p.(framework.PreScorePlugin).PreScore(ctx, state, test.pod, tf.BuildNodeInfos(test.nodes))\n\t\t\tif !test.wantStatus.Equal(status) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"InterPodAffinity#PreScore() returned unexpected status.Code got: %v, want: %v\", status.Code(), test.wantStatus.Code())\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar gotList framework.NodeScoreList\n\t\t\tfor _, n := range test.nodes {\n\t\t\t\tnodeName := n.ObjectMeta.Name\n\t\t\t\tscore, status := p.(framework.ScorePlugin).Score(ctx, state, test.pod, nodeName)\n\t\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tgotList = append(gotList, framework.NodeScore{Name: nodeName, Score: score})\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstatus = p.(framework.ScorePlugin).ScoreExtensions().NormalizeScore(ctx, state, test.pod, gotList)\n\t\t\tif !status.IsSuccess() {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected error: %v\", status)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(test.expectedList, gotList) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"expected:\\n\\t%+v,\\ngot:\\n\\t%+v\", test.expectedList, gotList)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n",

\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/testing\"\n\ttf \"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/scheduler/testing/framework\"\n)\n\n// TODO: Add test case for RequiredDuringSchedulingRequiredDuringExecution after it's implemented.\nfunc TestNodeAffinity(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname                string\n\t\tpod                 *v1.Pod\n\t\tlabels              map[string]string\n\t\tnodeName            string\n\t\twantStatus          *framework.Status\n\t\twantPreFilterStatus *framework.Status\n\t\twantPreFilterResult *framework.PreFilterResult\n\t\targs                config.NodeAffinityArgs\n\t\trunPreFilter        bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"missing labels\",\n\t\t\tpod: st.MakePod().NodeSelector(map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t}).Obj(),\n\t\t\twantStatus:   framework.NewStatus(framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable, ErrReasonPod),\n\t\t\trunPreFilter: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"same labels\",\n\t\t\tpod: st.MakePod().NodeSelector(map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t}).Obj(),\n\t\t\tlabels: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreFilter: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"node labels are superset\",\n\t\t\tpod: st.MakePod().NodeSelector(map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t}).Obj(),\n\t\t\tlabels: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\"baz\": \"blah\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreFilter: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"node labels are subset\",\n\t\t\tpod: st.MakePod().NodeSelector(map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t\t\"baz\": \"blah\",\n\t\t\t}).Obj(),\n\t\t\tlabels: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\twantStatus:   framework.NewStatus(framework.UnschedulableAndUnresolvable, ErrReasonPod),\n\t\t\trunPreFilter: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Pod with matchExpressions using In operator that matches the existing node\",\n\t\t\tpod: &v1.Pod{\n\t\t\t\tSpec: v1.PodSpec{\n\t\t\t\t\tAffinity: &v1.Affinity{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNodeAffinity: &v1.NodeAffinity{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRequiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution: &v1.NodeSelector{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNodeSelectorTerms: []v1.NodeSelectorTerm{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchExpressions: []v1.NodeSelectorRequirement{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey: map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": \"bar\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreFilter: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"Pod with matchExpressions using Gt operator that matches the existing map[string]string{\n\t\t\t\t// We use two digit to denote major version and two digit for minor version.\n\t\t\t\t\"kernel-version\": \"0206\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\trunPreFilter:
